reference: "Rĩu twĩna mbĩa cia mĩeri ĩna irarĩ na mũrimũ wa cukari na rĩu itirĩ naguo" Nake akĩongerera.

input.mt: Agĩcoka akĩongerera ũũ: "Rĩu tũrĩ na mbeũ cia mĩaka ĩna iria itarĩ na cukari, iria ciarĩ na cukari wa cukari".
input.src: "We now have 4-month-old mice that are non-diabetic that used to be diabetic," he added.

reference: Dagĩtarĩ Ehud Ur, profesa wa dawa cukuru mũnene wa Dalhousie Halifax, Nova Scotia na mũikarĩri gĩtĩ wa rũhonge rwa ũrigitani na ũthuthuria wa gĩkundi kĩa arũaru a mũrimu wa cukari Canada akĩheana mũkana atĩ ũthuthuria no hĩndĩ ũrambĩrĩirie

input.mt: Dr. Ehud Ur, profesa wa ũrigitani thĩinĩ wa Yunivasiti ya Dalhousie thĩinĩ wa Halifax, Nova Scotia, na mũtongoria wa gĩkundi kĩa ũrigitani na gĩthomo kĩa Canadian Diabetes Association, nĩ eerire atĩ ũthuthuria ũcio ũrĩ o matukũ-inĩ ma mbere.
input.src: Dr. Ehud Ur, professor of medicine at Dalhousie University in Halifax, Nova Scotia and chair of the clinical and scientific division of the Canadian Diabetes Association cautioned that the research is still in its early days.

reference: Mwaka wa 2017 ugĩ thira, Siminoff nionekanire televisheni ya ũgũri QVC.

input.mt: Mũthia-inĩ wa mwaka wa 2017, Siminoff nĩ onanirie TV ya QVC.
input.src: In late 2017, Siminoff appeared on shopping television channel QVC.

reference: Ring nĩacokire akĩnina ciira wa watho na acindani ake a kambũni ya ũgitĩri, ADT.

input.mt: O na ningĩ Ring nĩ aahotire kũiguithania na kambuni ĩmwe ya ũgitĩri, ADT Corporation.
input.src: Ring also settled a lawsuit with competing security company, the ADT Corporation.

reference: Onakoro njajo ĩmwe ya kũgeria kũgitĩra mũrimũ nĩyonekanĩte ta ĩranyihia ikuũ ciĩtanĩtio na mũrimũ wa Ebola, nginyagia ihinda rĩrĩ gũtirĩ ndaawa njega biũ cia gũthondeka mĩrimũ ĩrĩa ĩkuo.

input.mt: O na gũtuĩka ndawa ĩmwe ya gwĩthondeka nĩ yonekaga ĩrĩ na ũhoti wa kũniina gĩkuũ kĩa andũ arĩa makoragwo na mũrimũ wa Ebola, nginya rĩu gũtirĩ ndawa ĩngĩonanĩtie wega atĩ nĩ yagĩrĩire kũhiũrania na mũrimũ ũcio.
input.src: While one experimental vaccine appears able to reduce Ebola mortality, up until now, no drugs have been clearly demonstrated suitable for treating existing infection.

reference: Antibody cocktail ĩmwe, Zmapp, kĩambĩrĩria nĩyaheanĩte mwĩhoko mwena-inĩ, no mathomo mahetũkie makĩonania yarĩ na ũmithio mũnini kũringana na ũrĩa wendekanaga kurigĩrĩria ikuũ.

input.mt: Kĩndũ kĩmwe gĩetagwo ZMapp, kĩarĩ na irathimo nyingĩ mũno, no ũthuthuria nĩ wonanagia atĩ nĩ kĩahotete kũgirĩrĩria andũ gũkua.
input.src: One antibody cocktail, ZMapp, initially showed promise in the field, but formal studies indicated it had less benefit than sought in preventing death.

reference: Mageria-inĩ ma PALM, Zmapp yatũmĩriro nĩ atalamu a sayansi ta gĩthimi gĩa kũgerekania na ndaawa icio ingĩ ithatũ.

input.mt: Thĩinĩ wa mũgeranio wa PALM, ZMapp nĩ yatungataga ta mũtaratara wa gwĩthondeka, ũguo nĩ kuuga atĩ athomi a sayansi nĩ maamũhũthĩrire ta mũtaratara wa kwambĩrĩria na makĩringithania mĩthemba ĩngĩ ĩtatũ ya ũrigitani na mũtaratara ũcio.
input.src: In the PALM trial, ZMapp served as a control, meaning scientists used it as a baseline and compared the three other treatments to it.

reference: USA Gymnastics nĩmetĩkanĩtie na marũa ma committee ya America ya Olympics atĩ kwĩna bata mũnene wa andũ othe mahutainie na mathako ma olympics gũteithĩrĩria mathingira na matũra gũkoro na ũgitĩri ũrĩa wagĩrĩire harĩ athaki.

input.mt: USA Gymnastics nĩ ĩnyitaga mbaru marũa ma United States Olympic Committee na nĩ ĩnyitaga mbaru mabataro ma famĩlĩ ya Olympic ya kũrehe ũgitĩri harĩ athuthuria aitũ othe.
input.src: USA Gymnastics supports the United States Olympic Committee's letter and accepts the absolute need of the Olympic family to promote a safe environment for all of our athletes.

reference: Nĩtwĩtĩkĩranĩtie na mandĩkithia ma USOC at wendi wa athaki na irabu na mathako mao no ũkinyanĩire na njira ya gũthiĩ na mbere na mogarũrũku makinyanĩru ciũngano-inĩ ciao gũtarĩ kwehutĩrio certificate

input.mt: Nĩ twĩtĩkĩranagia na ciugo cia USOC atĩ maũndũ ma athũngũ na ikundi ciitũ, o hamwe na mathako mao, no matungatwo na njĩra njega na njĩra ya gũthiĩ na mbere na mogarũrũku ma bata thĩinĩ wa ithondeka ritũ, handũ ha kũniinwo.
input.src: We agree with the USOC's statement that the interests of our athletes and clubs, and their sport, may be better served by moving forward with meaningful change within our organization, rather than decertification.

reference: Gymnastics a America nĩ maranyita mbaru ũthuthuria urĩa ũngĩhotithia kũonania ũtũmĩri mũru wa mahinya ũrĩa wandĩkithĩtio nĩ arĩa mahonokire Larry Nassar ũrĩa ũngĩathiire ũtamenyekete kahinda karaihu na gwĩtĩkĩra mogarũrũku marĩa magĩrĩire.

input.mt: U.S. Gymnastics nĩ ĩnyitaga mbaru ũthuthuria wĩyathi ũrĩa ũngĩhotire gũtaarĩria ũrĩa kũhũthagĩra ũũru mũigana ũrĩa warĩrĩirio na ũcamba nĩ andũ arĩa maahonokire Larry Nassar kũngĩahotire kwaga kũmenyeka ihinda iraihu ũguo na nĩ ũgwatanĩtie na mogarũrũku marĩa mangĩabataranirie na magĩrĩire.
input.src: USA Gymnastics supports an independent investigation that may shine light on how abuse of the proportion described so courageously by the survivors of Larry Nassar could have gone undetected for so long and embraces any necessary and appropriate changes.

reference: Mĩaka-inĩ ĩyo ya ngiri ĩmwe na magana kenda ma mĩrongo ĩtandatũ, Brzezinski arutagĩra John F. Kennedy to mũmũtari agĩchoka akĩrutĩra Lyndon B. Johnson ũtongoria-inĩ.

input.mt: Mĩaka-inĩ ya 1960, Brzezinski nĩ aarutire wĩra wa John F. Kennedy arĩ mũtabarĩri wake na agĩcoka akĩruta wĩra wa ũtongoria wa Lyndon B. Johnson.
input.src: Throughout 1960s, Brzezinski worked for John F. Kennedy as his advisor and then the Lyndon B. Johnson administration.

reference: Ũthurani-inĩ wa mwaka wa ngiri ĩmwe na magana kenda ma mĩrongo mũgwanja na ithathatũ, nĩ ataarire Carter maũndũ-inĩ makoniĩ mĩtaratara ya kĩmabũrũri ma kĩgeni, agĩcooka handu-ini ha Henry Kissinger.

input.mt: Hĩndĩ ya ithurano cia mwaka wa 1976, nĩ aateithirie Carter maũndũ-inĩ ma ũteti wa nja, na thutha ũcio agĩtuĩka Mũrũgamĩrĩri wa Ũgitĩri wa Gwatanĩro ya Mabũrũri (NSA) kuuma mwaka wa 1977 nginya mwaka wa 1981, akĩrũmĩrĩra Henry Kissinger.
input.src: During the 1976 selections he advised Carter on foreign policy, then served as National Security Advisor (NSA) from 1977 to 1981, succeeding Henry Kissinger.

reference: Eta NSA, nĩateithirie Carter mĩtaratara-inĩ ma kũiguana thĩ yothe, mũno makĩria ta ũiguithanio wa kĩmabũrũri ta ma Camp David ma mwaka wa ngiri ĩmwe na magana kenda ma mĩrongo mũgwanja na inyanya, ũrutithania wa wĩra gatagatĩ ka USA na China mwaka-inĩ wa ngiri ĩmwe na magana kenda ma mĩrongo mũgwanja na mĩgomo ya bũrũri wa Iran ĩrĩa ya tũmire kũgĩe na thĩna wa ũnyitani wa mĩgwate mwaka-inĩ wa ngiri ĩmwe na magana kenda ma mĩrongo mũgwanja na kenda na matharĩkĩra ma bũrũri wa Afghanistan nĩ Soviet mwaka o ũcio.

input.mt: Arĩ NSA, nĩ aateithĩrĩirie Carter kũhingia maũndũ ma thĩ kũringana na ũteti, ta kĩrĩkanĩro kĩa Camp David, 1978; kũgarũra ũrata wa Amerika na China mũthia-inĩ wa mĩaka ya 1970; ũgarũrũku wa Iran, ũrĩa watũmire kũgĩe na thĩna wa Iran, 1979; na gũtharĩkĩra kwa Soviet bũrũri-inĩ wa Afghanistan, 1979.
input.src: As NSA, he assisted Carter in diplomatically handling world affairs, such as the Camp David Accords, 1978; normalizing US–China relations thought the late 1970s; the Iranian Revolution, which led to the Iran hostage crisis, 1979; and the Soviet invasion in Afghanistan, 1979.

reference: Movie inĩ ĩyo yarĩ na Ryan Gosling na Emma Stone nĩyacagũriro mĩena-inĩ yothe mĩnene.

input.mt: Firimu ĩyo, ĩrĩa ĩkoragwo na Ryan Gosling na Emma Stone, nĩ yambĩrĩirio maũndũ-inĩ mothe manene.
input.src: The movie, featuring Ryan Gosling and Emma Stone, received nominations in all major categories.

reference: Nyiĩmbo igĩrĩ movie-inĩ iyo nĩcio The fools who dream na City of stars, nĩcio ciathuriro irĩ ta nyiĩmbo iria njega mũno original. Nayo studio ya Lionsgate ĩgĩcagũrwo maita mĩrongo ĩrĩ na matandatũ ũngĩringithania na studio icio-ingĩ.

input.mt: Nyĩmbo igĩrĩ kuuma mbica-inĩ ĩyo, The Audition (The Fools Who Dream) na City of Stars, nĩ cianyiitwo kandarathi ya Nyĩmbo njega mũno. Studio ya Lionsgate nĩ yaanyitwo kandarathi 26 gũkĩra studio ĩngĩ o yothe.
input.src: Two songs from the movie, Audition (The Fools Who Dream) and City of Stars, received nominations for best original song. Lionsgate studio received 26 nominations — more than any other studio.

reference: Mũthenya wa Kiumia ũgĩthira, mũtongoria wa bũrũri wa Amerika nĩwe Donald Trump akĩruta ndũmĩrĩri kũhĩtũkĩra mũtabarĩri wa mohoro, na akiuga bũtũ ya Amerika nĩ ĩkũrutwo bũrũri wa Syria.

input.mt: Mũthenya wa kiumia, mũtongoria wa Amerika, Donald Trump, akĩmenyithia atĩ mbũtũ cia Amerika nĩ ikaatiga bũrũri wa Syria.
input.src: Late on Sunday, the United States President Donald Trump, in a statement delivered via the press secretary, announced US troops would be leaving Syria.

reference: Manĩrĩra macio maheaniro thutha wa Trump kwaranĩria na mũtongoria wa bũrũri wa Turkey Recep Tayyip Erdogan.

input.mt: Ũhoro ũyũ waheanirwo thutha wa Trump kwaranĩria thimũ na President wa Turkey Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.
input.src: The announcement was made after Trump had a phone conversation with Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.

reference: Bururi wa Turkey niwoyereire ugitĩri wa arũi a mbara cia ISIS iria cianyitĩtwo, na ndũmĩrĩri ĩyo ĩkiuga mabũrũri mothe ma Europe nĩmaregete  gucoka.

input.mt: O na ningĩ Turkey nĩ ĩgũthiĩ kũgitĩra arũngi a ISIS arĩa makoretwo makĩnyiitwo, o ta ũrĩa riboti ĩyo yugaga, mabũrũri ma Rũraya nĩ maregete kũmacokia bũrũri wao.
input.src: Turkey would also take over guarding captured ISIS fighters which, the statement said, European nations have refused to repatriate.

reference: ũndũ ũyũ to ngaja ũranina atĩ nyamũ icio cietago dinosaurs nĩ ciarĩ na mathagu, theory ĩmenyekanĩte mũno, no nĩwongagĩrĩra ũmenyo ũtangĩonekana matigari-inĩ ma nyamũ na mĩtĩ ta rangi na mũbango wa dĩmensions ithatũ.

input.mt: Ũndũ ũcio ti atĩ wonanagia atĩ andũ amwe nĩ maarĩ na mathagu, no nĩ wonanagia atĩ mathagu matingĩahotire kũgĩa na mathagu, ta rangi na mĩthemba ĩtatũ.
input.src: This not only confirms that at least some dinosaurs had feathers, a theory already widespread, but provides details fossils generally cannot, such as color and three-dimensional arrangement.

reference: Asayansi maugaga mathagu marĩa mothe mahumbĩraga mwĩrĩ wa nyamũ ĩno marĩ ma rangi mwerũ mwena wa igũrũ na mũtune kana rangi wa carotenoid mwena wa thĩ.

input.mt: Athomi a sayansi moigaga atĩ mũtwe wa nyamũ ĩyo warĩ wa rangi wa chestnut-brown igũrũ na mũhuro wayo warĩ wa rangi wa karotenoid.
input.src: . Scientists say this animal's plumage was chestnut-brown on top with a pale or carotenoid-colored underside.

reference: Maumĩrĩra macio nĩ maraheana mawoni ma ũrĩa mathagu ma nyoni macenjagia na mahinda.

input.mt: Ũndũ ũcio nĩ ũtũteithagia kũmenya ũrĩa nyoni ciũmbũyagia.
input.src: The find also grants insight into the evolution of feathers in birds.

reference: Tondũ mathagu ma dinosaur matikorago na shaft ikũrĩte wega ĩrĩ  ĩtagwo rachis, no mathagu macio nĩ marĩ na mũmbĩre ũngĩ ta barbs and barbules, athuthuria nĩmahetũkirie atĩ rachis icio noanga ciakũrire ta maũmbĩre maria magĩire o ũrĩa mumbĩre wacio wacenjagia mũico-inĩ.

input.mt: Tondũ mathagu ma ndinozauro matiarĩ na gĩthima kĩarĩ na ũgarũrũku mwega, kĩrĩa gĩetagwo rachis, no makoragwo na itemi ingĩ cia mathagu  mathagu na mathagu  athuthuria nĩ maatuire atĩ rachis nĩ ũndũ wa ũgarũrũku wa ũgarũrũku wa indo iria ingĩ.
input.src: Because the dinosaur feathers do not have a well-developed shaft, called a rachis, but do have other features of feathers — barbs and barbules — the researchers inferred the rachis was likely a later evolutionary development that these other features.

reference: Athuthuria nĩmatuire atĩ, ona akorwo mũting'oe ũcio warĩ wa dĩnosaur nini, mũhiano ũrĩa watũmĩkaga wonanagia mathagu ma nyamũ ng'ima no ti nini na thĩ.

input.mt: Athuthuria acio moonanirie atĩ o na gũtuĩka rũũri rũu nĩ rwa dinosaurus, rũthiomi rũu rwerekanaga atĩ mũndũ mũgima nĩ arĩ na mathagu, no ti mũriũ.
input.src: The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.

reference: Bomu ya ngari ĩrĩa yaripũkire gĩikaro kĩnene kĩa thigari Gaziantep, Turkey mũthenya wa ira kĩroko ĩroraga thigari igĩrĩ na angĩ makĩria ya mĩrongo ĩrĩ maragĩa na nguraro.

input.mt: Mĩthenya ya rũcinĩ ĩgĩthũkũkĩra mũciĩ mũnene wa thirikari wa Gaziantep, bũrũri-inĩ wa Turkey, ngari ya mbomu ĩgĩthũkũkĩra ĩkĩũraga athuri eerĩ a borithi na ĩkĩhũũra andũ angĩ makĩria ma mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ.
input.src: A car bomb detonated at police headquarters in Gaziantep, Turkey yesterday morning killed two police officers and injured more than twenty other people.

reference: Ofici ya gavana ĩkiuga atĩ harĩ acio magurarire  ikũmi na keenda marĩ thigari.

input.mt: Wabici ya ngavana nĩ yoigĩte atĩ andũ ikũmi na kenda arĩa maakuĩte nĩ maabithaa a borithi.
input.src: The governor's office said nineteen of the injured were police officers.

reference: Na magĩtaũkĩrwo na makĩmenya atĩ riũa nĩ rĩhanaine na rĩrutaga wĩra ta njata icio ingĩ: Mawĩko ma njata ciothe mahotekĩkaga nĩ ũrĩa irutaga ũtheri na marangi, gũthiũrũrũka na gũtiri ũndũ ũngĩ.

input.mt: Nĩ moonire atĩ riũa rĩathiaga na mbere kũringana na ithimi iria ingĩ cia njata: Njata ciothe iria irĩ thĩinĩ wa mũtabarĩre wa njata ciathiaga na mbere kũgerera ũtheri wacio, kũgarũrũka kwacio, na gũtirĩ ũndũ ũngĩ.
input.src: They found the Sun operated on the same basic principles as other stars: The activity of all stars in the system was found to be driven by their luminosity, their rotation, and nothing else.

reference: ũruti ũcio wa ũtheri na marangi na gũthiũrũrũka inyitithanagio kũonania namba ĩtagwo star's Rossby, ĩrĩa ĩkonainie na plasma flow.

input.mt: Ũtheri na kũgarũrũka kũhũthĩrĩtwo hamwe nĩguo gũtuĩke namba ya Rossby ya njata, ĩrĩa ĩhutanĩtie na gũthuthĩka kwa plasma.
input.src: The luminosity and rotation are used together to determine a star's Rossby number, which is related to plasma flow.

reference: O urĩa namba ĩyo ya Rossby ĩ nini noguo njata ikorago ĩ ĩ less active kũringana na magnetic reversals.

input.mt: O ũrĩa mũigana wa Rossby ũringithanagia, noguo njata ĩgakorũo ĩtarĩ na hinya wa kũgarũrũka.
input.src: The smaller the Rossby number, the less active the star with respect to magnetic reversals.

reference: Hĩndĩ ya iceera rĩake, Iwasaki nĩacemanirie na mathĩĩna maita maingĩ.

input.mt: Hĩndĩ ya rũgendo rwake, Iwasaki nĩ aacemanirie na mathĩna maita maingĩ.
input.src: During his trip, Iwasaki ran into trouble on many occasions.

reference: Nĩatunyirwo nĩ Pirates, akĩhithũkĩrwo Tibet nĩ ngui ndwaru, akĩũrĩra kĩhiko Nepal na akĩohwo njera India.

input.mt: Nĩ aanyiitirũo nĩ atunyani, akĩũragwo Tibet nĩ ngui njũru, akĩũra kĩhiko-inĩ bũrũri-inĩ wa Nepal, na akĩnyiitwo njera bũrũri-inĩ wa India.
input.src: He was robbed by pirates, attacked in Tibet by a rabid dog, escaped marriage in Nepal and was arrested in India.

reference: Nayo 802.11n standard ĩrutaga wĩra harĩ mitambo ini ya 2.4Ghz na 5.0gHZ cierĩ.

input.mt: Standard ya 802.11n ĩrutaga wĩra na mahenya ma 2.4Ghz na 5.0Ghz.
input.src: The 802.11n standard operates on both the 2.4Ghz and 5.0Ghz frequencies.

reference: ũguo nĩ uteithagia kũnyitithanĩkia na thutha na 802.11a, 802.11b, na 802.11g angĩkorwo base station ĩna dual radios.

input.mt: Ũndũ ũcio nĩ ũgũtũma ũhote gũkinyanĩra na 802.11a, 802.11b na 802.11g, angĩkorũo gĩcigo kĩa mũthingi nĩ kĩrĩ na iradiĩ igĩrĩ.
input.src: This will allow it to be backwards compatible with 802.11a, 802.11b and 802.11g, provided that the base station has dual radios.

reference: Duvall, urĩa wa hikĩte ena ciana igĩrĩ ng'ima, ndatigire na thutha ũndũ mũnene wa gũkenia Miller, ũrĩa rũgano rũraria ũhoro wake.

input.mt: Duvall, ũrĩa ũhikanĩtie na arĩ na ciana igĩrĩ cia andũ agima, ndaahotire kũgucĩrĩria mũno Miller, ũrĩa rũgano rũu rwarĩrĩirio.
input.src: Duvall, who is married with two adult children, did not leave a big impression on Miller, to whom the story was related.

reference: rĩrĩa erirwo arĩrĩrie ũhoro ũcio, Miller akiuga, "Mike nĩaragia mũno hĩndĩ ya ciira…Nĩkwĩharĩria deharagĩria koguo diaiguire ũrĩa augaga."

input.mt: Rĩrĩa maamũririe ndũmĩrĩri, Miller oigire ũũ: "Mike nĩ aaragia mũno hĩndĩ ya mĩcemanio ĩyo. Nĩ ndehaarĩirie nĩ ũndũ ũcio ndiathikagĩrĩria ũrĩa oigaga".
input.src: When asked for comment, Miller said, "Mike talks a lot during the hearing...I was getting ready so I wasn't really hearing what he was saying."

reference: "Nĩtũkwĩrutanĩria na tũtigĩrĩre nitwanyihia ũrekereria wa carbon dioxide rĩera-inĩ o harĩ gĩchunjĩ kĩmwe kĩa GDP ya bũrũri na gacunjĩ karoneka gũgĩkinyĩria mwaka wa ngiri igĩrĩ na mĩrongo ĩrĩ kuma harĩa hakinyĩtio mwaka wa ngiri igĩrĩ na ithano." Hu kuuga.

input.mt: Hu oigire, "Nĩ tũgũthiĩ na mbere kũgeria kũniina ũthii wa na mbere wa carbon dioxide harĩ gĩcigo kĩmwe kĩa GDP na njĩra ya kũgirĩrĩria mũno nginya mwaka wa 2020 kũringana na mũigana wa mwaka wa 2005".
input.src: "We will endeavour to cut carbon dioxide emissions per unit of GDP by a notable margin by 2020 from the 2005 level," Hu said.

reference: Ndagwetire harĩa mekũrenga na number cigana, nĩaugire mekũnyihia kũringana na maumĩrĩra ma uchumi wa China.

input.mt: Ndaarĩirie mũigana wa mbeca icio, akiuga nĩ ikaahũthĩrũo kũgerera ũthii wa na mbere wa ũthii wa na mbere wa bũrũri wa China.
input.src: He did not set a figure for the cuts, saying they will be made based on China's economic output.

reference: Hu nĩ ahinyĩrĩirie mabũrũri marĩa marekũria atĩ "meyeheranie na maũndũ matene marĩa mathũkagia kĩambĩrĩria, na gũtheria thutha-inĩ."

input.mt: Hu eerire mabũrũri marĩa marathiĩ na mbere gũkũria ũgarũrũku "maige njĩra ya tene ya gũthũkia indo mbere na gũtheria indo ciao thutha-inĩ".
input.src: Hu encouraged developing countries "to avoid the old path of polluting first and cleaning up later."

reference: Nake akĩongerera akiuga atĩ "matiagĩrĩirwo, ona kũrĩ o ũguo, nĩ kũigĩrĩrwo mũrigo ũkĩrĩtie ũthii wao wa nambere, ũiigĩrĩrĩki na ũhoti."

input.mt: Oigire atĩ "o na kũrĩ ũguo, matiagĩrĩirũo kũbatithio kwĩhokera mawĩra marĩa mangĩaga kũhingia, mawĩra mao, na ũhoti wao".
input.src: He added that "they should not, however, be asked to take on obligations that go beyond their development stage, responsibility and capabilities."

reference: Gĩkundi kĩa ũthomi Iraq kĩarehire rofoti 12.00 GMT ũmũthĩ.

input.mt: Kĩama gĩa Iraqi Study Group nĩ kĩarutire riboti ya kĩo thaa 12 cia hwaĩ-inĩ (GMT) ũmũthĩ.
input.src: The Iraq Study Group presented its report at 12.00 GMT today.

reference: ĩraheana mũkana atĩ gũtirĩ mũndũ ona ũmwe ũngĩheana ũma atĩ kũrĩ ikinya ona rĩmwe Iraq kahinda-inĩ gaka rĩngĩrũgamia haro, kwongerereka kwa ngahĩha, kana kwerekeria  wongerereku wa maũndũ ma mbĩtĩka.

input.mt: Gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe ũngĩhota gwĩkĩra atĩ ũndũ o wothe ũgeekwo bũrũri-inĩ wa Iraki nĩ ũgaatiga mbaara cia ndini, ũhinya ũrĩa ũrathiĩ ũkĩongerereka, kana ũgarũrũku ũgĩkinye ngucanio-inĩ.
input.src: It warns No one can guarantee that any course of action in Iraq at this point will stop sectarian warfare, growing violence, or a slide toward chaos.

reference: Report ĩyo yambĩrĩirie na ihoya rĩa waranĩria na ũthondeki wa ũiguano bũrũri-inĩ wa America ũigiĩ mĩtaratara ya Middle East.

input.mt: Riboti ĩyo yambagĩrĩria na kwaranĩria na andũ na njĩra ya kũgĩa na ũiguano gatagatĩ-inĩ ka mabũrũri ma Amerika megiĩ ũtongoria wa mabũrũri ma mwena wa gatagatĩ wa Irathĩro.
input.src: The Report opens with plea for open debate and the formation of a consensus in the United States about the policy towards the Middle East.

reference: Maũndũ marĩa ma mbere harĩ mendĩkithia macio mĩrongo mũgwanja na inyanya nĩ kwambĩrĩria mũbango mwerũ wa ũtongoria wa waragania ũrĩa wagĩrĩirwo nĩ kwambĩrĩrio bere ya mũico wa mwaka nĩndũ wa ũgitĩri wa mũhaka wa Iraq kũmana na tharĩkĩra na waki mwerũ wa ũrata na mabũrũri marĩa mamarigicĩirie.

input.mt: Ũndũ wa mbere gatagatĩ-inĩ ka mĩbango yake 78 nĩ atĩ, mbere ya mũthia wa mwaka ũyũ, nĩ kũgĩrĩire gwĩkwo kĩyo kĩerũ gĩa ũteti gĩa kũgitĩra mĩhaka ya Iraq kũringana na ũhinya wa thũ na gũcokia ũkuruhanu wa ũteti na mabũrũri marĩa marĩ hakuhĩ nayo.
input.src: First among its 78 recommendations is that a new diplomatic initiative should be taken before the end of this year to secure Iraq’s borders against hostile interventions and to re-establish diplomatic relations with its neighbors.

reference: Mũikarĩri gĩtĩ gĩa Senator kahinda gaka na mũtũmia wa mbere wa president wa Argentina nĩwe Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner akĩanĩrĩra ũhũranĩri wa gĩturwa kĩa ũtongoria wa bũrũri mũthenya wa ira hwaĩ-ini kũrĩa La Plata, city ĩ kilometer mĩrongo ĩtano kana mairo mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ĩmwe kũraihĩrĩria Buenos Aires.

input.mt: Seneta wa mahinda maya na mũtumia wa mbere wa Argentina Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner nĩ onanirie mweke wake wa gwathana ta mũtongoria wa bũrũri ũmũthĩ hwaĩ-inĩ kũu La Plata, taũni ĩrĩa ĩrĩ kilomita 50 kuuma Buenos Aires.
input.src: Current senator and Argentine First Lady Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner announced her presidential candidacy yesterday evening in La Plata, a city 50 kilometers (31 miles) away from Buenos Aires.

reference: Mũtumia wa Kirchner anĩrĩire itua rĩake kũhũranĩra gĩtĩ kĩa mũnene wa bũrũri kũrĩa Argentine Theatre, o harĩa ambagĩrĩria campaign ciake cia member wa Senate Buenos Aires Province delegation mwaka wa ngiri igĩrĩ na ithano.

input.mt: Mwarĩ wa Ithe witũ Kirchner nĩ onanirie muoroto wake wa gwĩthurĩra gĩtĩ kĩa mũtongoria wa Argentina Theatre, handũ harĩa aambĩrĩirie gĩthurano gĩake kĩa Senate mwaka wa 2005 arĩ mũrũmĩrĩri wa gĩcigo kĩa Buenos Aires.
input.src: Mrs. Kirchner announced her intention to run for president at the Argentine Theatre, the same location she used to start her 2005 campaign for the Senate as member of the Buenos Aires province delegation.

reference: Debate ĩyo yambĩrĩirio nĩ ngarari cigiĩ ũtũmĩri wa ũteithio na waki nĩũndũ wa kĩhuhũkanio gĩa Katrina, kĩrĩa amwe a fiscal conservatives metire na kĩnyũrũri "Bush's New Orleans Deal."

input.mt: Ũkararania ũcio waambĩrĩirie nĩ ũndũ wa ngarari ya kũhũthĩra mbeca cia ũteithio na gwaka rĩngĩ thutha wa kĩhuhũkanio kĩa Katrina.
input.src: The debate was sparked by controversy over spending on relief and reconstruction in the wake Hurricane Katrina; which some fiscal conservatives have humorously labeled "Bush's New Orleans Deal."

reference: Gĩkundi kĩrĩa kiheaga gĩto na gĩgetĩkĩra mawoni ma andũ kĩa liberal gĩgĩkararania na makinya ma waki rĩngĩ gĩtũmi contract ciothe cia waki ciaheago akinyanĩria ũhoro thĩinĩ wa washington.

input.mt: Andũ arĩa matongoragia wĩra wa gwaka thĩ rĩngĩ nĩ makoretwo makĩaria mũno ũhoro wa kũheana mĩhothi ya gwaka thĩ rĩngĩ kũrĩ andũ arĩa moigaga atĩ nĩ marĩ thĩinĩ wa Washington.
input.src: Liberal criticism of the reconstruction effort has focused on the awarding of reconstruction contracts to perceived Washington insiders.

reference: Makĩrĩa ma andũ million inya nĩmekinyĩtie Rome gũthiĩ mathiko.

input.mt: Andũ makĩria ma milioni inya nĩ maathiĩte Roma gũthikĩrĩria mathiko macio.
input.src: Over four million people went to Rome to attend the funeral.

reference: Andu arĩa mekinyĩtie marĩ aingĩ, nĩũguo gũkagĩa na ũritũ mũnene harĩ andũ othe arĩa mendaga gũkinya mathiko-inĩ St. Peter's Square.

input.mt: Mũigana wa andũ arĩa maarĩ ho warĩ mũnene mũno ũũ atĩ gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe ũngĩahotire gũthiĩ mathiko-inĩ ma St. Peter's Square.
input.src: The number of people present was so large that it was not possible for everybody to gain access to the funeral in St. Peter's Square.

reference: Mataoni manene mangiĩ maingĩ kũu Italy na thĩ yoothe, mũno makĩria Poland, mĩbango ĩhanaine nĩ yathondeketwo, ĩrĩa yonagwo nĩ andũ aingĩ.

input.mt: Matũũra-inĩ mangĩ maingĩ bũrũri-inĩ wa Italy na mabũrũri-inĩ marĩa mangĩ ma thĩ, na makĩria bũrũri-inĩ wa Poland, andũ aingĩ nĩ moonire maũndũ ta macio.
input.src: In many other cities of Italy and in the rest of the world, particularly in Poland, similar setups were made, which were viewed by a great number of people.

reference: Andĩki a maũndũ ma gatene nĩmamenereirie mĩtaratara ĩrĩa yatũmĩragwo nĩ FBI nĩũndũ wa gũtũmĩra indo cia bata gũtangĩkĩra maciira marĩa marĩ mahũthũ gũtũithania, mũno makĩria ũici wa ngaari, na itua rĩa kũongerera ũhotani wao.

input.mt: Athuthuria a maũndũ ma historĩ nĩ maameneretie mogarũrũku ma tene ma FBI nĩ ũndũ wa kũhũthĩra mbeca ciao kũhingia ciira iria ciarĩ na ũhoti wa kũhiũrania nacio, na makĩria ciira cia ngari iria cianyiitwo, marĩ na muoroto wa kuongerera ũhootani wa kambũni ĩyo.
input.src: Historians have criticized past FBI policies for focusing resources on cases which are easy to solve, especially stolen car cases, with the intent of boosting the agency's success rate.

reference: Athaki a middle order batsmen, Sachin Tendulkar na Rahul Dravid, magĩthaka wega na makĩnyitanĩra gũthondeka runs igana rĩmwe.

input.mt: Athuri a ngathĩti ya gatagatĩ, Sachin Tendulkar na Rahul Dravid, nĩ maanyitire wĩra mwega na makĩgĩa na mũtaratara wa mĩtaratara igana rĩmwe.
input.src: Middle order batsmen, Sachin Tendulkar and Rahul Dravid, performed well and made a hundred-run partnership.

reference: No thutha wa kũranwo na Captain's wicket, India yahotire gũthodeka mahenya mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ĩtandatũ magĩĩte wickets mũgwanja kũniina innings.

input.mt: O na kũrĩ ũguo, thutha wa gũtoorio nĩ mũtongoria-rĩ, India nĩ yaahotire gũtooria ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya.
input.src: But, after losing the captain's wicket India only made 36 runs loosing 7 wickets to end the innings.

reference: Mũtongoria wa U.S George W Bush agĩkinya Singapore kĩroko kĩa mweri ikũmi na ithathatũ wa ikũmi na ĩmwe, akĩambĩrĩria iceera rĩake inene mwena wa Asia.

input.mt: Mutongoria wa Amerika George W. Bush aakinyire Singapore rũcinĩ rwa Novemba 16, akĩambĩrĩria rũgendo rwa gũthiĩ Asia rũthatũ ũmwe.
input.src: U.S. President George W. Bush arrived in Singapore the morning of November 16, beginning a week-long tour of Asia.

reference: Thutha wa kiumia kĩmwe kĩa hathara ithurano-inĩ cia midterm, Bush akĩra arĩa mathikĩrĩirie ũhoro wa gũtambia biacara Asia.

input.mt: Thutha wa gũtoorio thutha wa kiumia kĩmwe, Bush nĩ eerire andũ ũhoro wĩgiĩ ũgarũrũku wa biacara bũrũri-inĩ wa Asia.
input.src: After a week of losses in the midterm election, Bush told an audience about the expansion of trade in Asia.

reference: Mũnene wa ministers Stephen Harper nĩaretĩkĩrĩre gũtũma 'Clean Air Act' ya thirikari kũrĩ committee ya ciama ciothe mamĩrore, mbere ya ithoma rĩa kerĩ, thutha wa mũcemanio wa dagĩka mĩrongo ĩrĩ na ithano mũthenya wa keerĩ na mũtongoria wa NDP Jack Layton kũu PMO.

input.mt: Mutongoria wa bururi Stephen Harper nĩ eetĩkĩrire gũtũma 'Clean Air Act' ya thirikari kũrĩ kamĩtĩ ya ciama ciothe nĩgetha ĩgũthuthuria, mbere ya gũthomwo kwacio kwa kerĩ, thutha wa mĩcemanio ya ndagĩka 25 na mũtongoria wa NDP Jack Layton mũcemanio-inĩ wa PMO.
input.src: Prime Minister Stephen Harper has agreed to send the government's 'Clean Air Act' to an all-party committee for review, before its second reading, after Tuesday's 25 minute meeting with NDP leader Jack Layton at the PMO.

reference: Lyton nĨendekithĨtie watho wa Conservatives Environmental ucenjio hĨndĨ ya mũcemanio na PM akiendekithia " watho wa  Conservatives Environmental ũrorwo wega na wandĨkwo werũ.

input.mt: Layton nĩ eendaga kũgarũrĩrwo kwa watho wa mũthingi wa gĩkundi kĩa Conservatives hĩndĩ ya mũcemanio wake na mũtongoria wa bũrũri, akĩenda "gũthondekwo na kũgarũrũo biũ" kwa watho wa mũthingi wa gĩkundi kĩa Conservative.
input.src: Layton had asked for changes to the conservatives' environmental bill during the meeting with the PM, asking for a "thorough and complete rewriting" of the Conservative party's environmental bill.

reference: Kuma hĨndĨ Ĩria thirikari nene yoereire gũteithĨrĨria Mersey Hospital kũrĨa Devonport, Tasmania, thirikari ya matũũra na abunge amwe a thirikari nene nĨmareganire na watho ũyũ makiuga atĨ nĨ mũbango wa thirikari nene wa kwĨharĨrirĨa kũri gĨthurano kĨa thirikari nene mweri wa Ikumi na ũmwe.

input.mt: Kuuma rĩrĩa thirikari ya bururi yaambĩrĩirie kũruta mbeca cia thibitari ya Mersey mwena wa Devonport, Tasmania, thirikari ya bũrũri na ambunge amwe a mũingĩ wa bururi nĩ makoretwo makiuga ũndũ ũcio nĩ mũtaratara wa mbere wa ithurano cia bururi iria ikaahingwo mweri-inĩ wa Novemba.
input.src: Ever since the Federal Government stepped in to take over funding of the Mersey hospital in Devonport, Tasmania, the state government and some federal MPs have criticised this act as a stunt in the prelude to the federal election to be called by November.

reference: No MĨnĨsta Mũkaru John Howard augĨte atĨ watho wa kũheana AUD$445 milioni warongoreirio kũgitĨra indo cia thibitari kuuma kũgũithio ngathĨ ni thirikari ya Tasmania.

input.mt: No mutongoria wa bururi John Howard augite mubango ucio niguo gwithema thibitari ino gutharikirwo ni thirikari ya Tasmania, na kuheana muigana wa AUD mirioni 45 cia kuongererwo.
input.src: But Prime Minister John Howard has said the act was only to safeguard the facilities of the hospital from being downgraded by the Tasmanian government, in giving an extra AUD$45 million.

reference: Mohoro ma ica ikuhĨ ma ithimi cia mũigana wa maaĨ iria-inĨ maronania atĨ kwĨna Sunami. Nikwari na maũndũ megainie na sunami monekire hakuhĨ na Pago Pago na Niue.

input.mt: Kũringana na riboti ĩyo ya ica ikuhĩ, ũthuthuria wa igũrũ rĩa iria nĩ wonanagia atĩ nĩ kwarĩ na tsunami, na nĩ kwarĩ na tsunami hakuhĩ na Pago Pago na Niue.
input.src: According to the latest bulletin, sea level readings indicated a tsunami was generated. There was some definite tsunami activity recorded near Pago Pago and Niue.

reference: Gũtirĩ na ũthũkangia kana nguraro nyingĩ cionekire Tonga, no thitima nĩciorire gwa kahinda kanini, na kwahoteka nĩkĩo gĩtũmi kĩarigĩrĩirie ũrũgamĩrĩri wa Tonga kwamũkĩra ndũmirĩri ya kwĩhũga na kĩhuhũkanio ĩrĩa yarutirwo nĩ PTWC.

input.mt: Gũtirĩ mahĩtia manene kana mĩrimũ ĩkoretwo ĩgakorwo ĩkĩheanwo bũrũri-inĩ wa Tonga, ĩndĩ hinya wa thitima nĩ wahutirio kwa ihinda, na ũndũ ũcio nĩ ũgiririe anene a bũrũri wa Tonga kũheo mũkaana wa tsunami ũrĩa waheanĩtwo nĩ PTWC.
input.src: No major damage or injuries have been reported in Tonga, but power was temporarily lost, which reportedly prevented Tongan authorities from receiving the tsunami warning issued by the PTWC.

reference: Cukuru ikũmi na inya thĨiniĨ wa Hawaii iria ciarĨ mũico-inĨ wa iria kana hakuhĨ na iria nairahingirwo Wagatatu wothe ona thutha wa mĨkana kurutwo.

input.mt: Thukuru ikũmi na inya cia Hawaii iria ciarĩ mwena wa rũgongo kana hakuhĩ na hũgũrũrũ cia iria ciaregirũo mũthenya wa Gatatũ o na gũtuĩka nĩ ciaregirũo.
input.src: Fourteen schools in Hawaii located on or near coastlines were closed all of Wednesday despite the warnings being lifted.

reference: Presidenti wa U.S. George W. Bush nĨakenereire kĨmenyithia kĨu.

input.mt: Mũtongoria wa Amerika George W. Bush nĩ aakenire mũno nĩ ũndũ wa kũmenyithia andũ ũhoro ũcio.
input.src: U.S. President George W. Bush welcomed the announcement.

reference: Johndroe etire itua rĨa North Korea "Ikinya inene harĨ gũkinyanĨria mũtaratara wa kũnina nyukilia thĨiniĨ wa Peninsula ya Korea."

input.mt: Gordon Johndroe, ũrĩa waragia na Bush, eetire mwĩhĩtwa wa Korea ya Rũgongo "kĩendo kĩnene harĩ kũhingia muoroto wa kũniina indo cia mbaara cia nyuklia gĩcigĩrĩra-inĩ kĩa Korea".
input.src: Bush spokesman Gordon Johndroe called North Korea's pledge "a major step towards the goal of achieving the verifiable denuclearization of the Korean peninsula."

reference: KĨhuhũkanio kĨa ikũmĨ kumana na ũnene wakĨo thĨiniĨ wa kĨmera kĨa ihuhũkanio kĨa Atlantic, kĨrĨa gĨetagwo Storm Jerry nigĨthondekire thĨiniĨ wa iria rĨa Atlantic ũmũthi.

input.mt: Kĩhuhũkanio gĩa ikũmi kĩa Atlantic Hurricane season, Subtropical Storm Jerry, kĩambĩrĩirie thĩinĩ wa Iria rĩa Atlantic ũmũthĩ.
input.src: The tenth named storm of the Atlantic Hurricane season, Subtropical Storm Jerry, formed in the Atlantic Ocean today.

reference: Rũhonge rwa gĨ-bũrũri rwa ihuhũkanio (NHC) rũroiga atĨ gwa kahinda gaka Jerry ti ũgwati kũrĨ thĨ nyũmũ.

input.mt: Rũhonge rwa National Hurricane Center (NHC) ruugĩte atĩ ihinda-inĩ rĩrĩ Jerry ndarĩ na ũgwati wa gũkinya thĩ.
input.src: The National Hurricane Center (NHC) says that at this point Jerry poses no threat to land.

reference: Gikundi kĨa inginia a U.S. maregereria atĨ inji 6 cia mbura no ciune mĨhĨnga irĨa yerĨgĨte gũthũka.

input.mt: Ũthuthuria wa U.S. Corps of Engineers woigaga atĩ mbura nene ta inchi 15 nĩ ingĩthũkia ithaka iria cianangĩtwo mbere ĩyo.
input.src: The U.S. Corps of Engineers estimated that 6 inches of rainfall could breach the previously damaged levees.

reference: Wadi ya kenda, irĨa yarĨ na kĨguũ gia biti 20 hĨndĨ  ya kĨhuhũkanio gĨa Katrina, rĨũ maaĨ makinyĨte njohero kuumania na kũgwa kwa mũhinga.

input.mt: Kĩhingo gĩa kenda, kĩrĩa kĩarĩ na mĩiyũro ya mita 20 hĩndĩ ya kĩhuhũkanio kĩa Katrina, rĩu nĩ kĩiyũragwo nĩ maaĩ tondũ gĩthaka kĩrĩa kĩarĩ hakuhĩ nĩ kĩiyũragwo.
input.src: The Ninth Ward, which saw flooding as high as 20 feet during Hurricane Katrina, is currently in waist-high water as the nearby levee was overtopped.

reference: MaaĨ maragerera igũrũ rwa mũhĨnga handũ-inĨ ha wariĨ wa buti 100.

input.mt: Maaĩ marathiĩ na mbere gũtherera gĩtuĩ-inĩ kĩa maaĩ kĩrĩa kĩarĩ na ũraihu wa metha igana rĩmwe.
input.src: Water is spilling over the levee in a section 100 feet wide.

reference: MũrũgamĨrĨri wa Commons Adam Cuerden nĨonanirie marakara kuumana na gũthario hĨndĨ irĨa aririe na Wikinews mweri mũhetũku.

input.mt: Admin wa Commons Adam Cuerden nĩ onanirie ũritũ wake nĩ ũndũ wa kũherithio rĩrĩa aaririe na Wikinews mweri ũcio ũrathirire.
input.src: Commons Administrator Adam Cuerden expressed his frustration over the deletions when he spoke to Wikinews last month.

reference: "We (Wales) nĨatũhenirie kuuma kĨambirĨria. Wambere nĨ kuonania ta itũmi ici cietĨkĨrĨte kĨ-watho. WakeerĨ nĨ gwĨtua atĨ nĨatũthikagĨrĨria nginya hĨndĨ irĨa atharirie wĨra wake wa ũcori.”

input.mt: Oigire ũũ: "[Wales] nĩ aatwĩrire maheeni kuuma o kĩambĩrĩria. Ũndũ wa mbere, eekaga o ta arĩ na itũmi cia kĩhooto, na wa kerĩ, eekaga ta aatũiguaga nginya akĩniina marũa macio".
input.src: "He [Wales] basically lied to us from the start. First, by acting as if this was for legal reasons. Second, by pretending he was listening to us, right up to his art deletion."

reference: Kwaga kũiganĨra kwa mũingĨ nĨkuo gwacũngĨrĨirie mĨtaratara ya kwandĨka watho wĨgainie na maũndũ ma ũũra thoni kũrĨ site iria ikoragwo ihete marũa matari mĨhĨnga kũrĨ mamilioni ma nyũmba cia mohoro.

input.mt: Ũndũ ũcio nĩ watũmire andũ makorũo makĩgeria kũruta watho wĩgiĩ maũndũ megiĩ ngomanio thĩinĩ wa kambũni ĩrĩa ĩkoragwo na ngathĩti milioni nyingĩ iria irĩ na marũa ma kũmenyithia andũ maũndũ megiĩ ngomanio.
input.src: The community irritation led to current efforts to draft a policy regarding sexual content for the site which hosts millions of openly-licensed media.

reference: wira ũria wekirwo mũingi waari wa gũthoma,no programu yadĩketwo gũteithiriria maũndũ maria monagwo galaxy ya Sagittarius.

input.mt: Wĩra ũrĩa wekirũo warĩ wa gwĩciria, no mũbango ũcio waandĩkirũo nĩguo ũgerekanie na maũndũ marĩa meekirũo igũrũ rĩa ndata ya Sagittarius.
input.src: The work done was mostly theoretical, but the program was written to simulate observations made of the Sagittarius galaxy.

reference: ũndũ ũria aathuthuria methaga warehagwo ni tidal forces ĨrĨa Ĩkoragwo gatagati ka galaxy's dark matter na Milky Way's dark matter.

input.mt: Ũndũ ũrĩa gĩkundi kĩu kĩracaria no woneke ta ũtongoretio nĩ hinya wa magũrũ gatagatĩ-inĩ ka nduma ndumanu ya nduma ĩyo na nduma ndumanu ya Njĩra ya Nyaga.
input.src: The effect the team was looking for would be caused by tidal forces between the galaxy's dark matter and the Milky Way's dark matter.

reference: Athuthuria nĨ mahotire kumenya atĨ dark matter Ĩhotaga dark matter ĨngĨ ota uria Ĩhotaga matter cia kawaida.

input.mt: Athomi acio a sayansi nĩ maahotire kuona atĩ indo cia nduma nĩ cihutagia indo ingĩ cia nduma o ta ũrĩa indo cia ndũire cihutagia.
input.src: The scientists were able to conclude that the dark matter affect other dark matter in the same way regular matter does.

reference: Mathomo maya maugaga atĨ dark matter nyingĨ irĨa ikoragwo ithiũrũrũkĨirie galaxy cikoragwo ithiũrũrũkĨirie galaxy kwa mũhiano wa halo na ikoragwo ithondeketwo na tũnyamu tũnini.

input.mt: Ũrutani ũyũ woigaga atĩ indo nyingĩ cia nduma iria ciikaraga ndaya-inĩ ciikaraga ndaya-inĩ ya ndaya, na ciũmbĩtwo nĩ tũcunjĩ tũnini tũingĩ.
input.src: This theory says that most dark matter around a galaxy is located around a galaxy in a kind of halo, and is made of lots of small particles.

reference: Roboti kuumana na Televisheni cironania ndogo njerũ Ĩkiuma kuuma mũtambo-inĨ.

input.mt: Riboti cia televiseni cionanagia rũkũngũ rũgĩũka kuuma kambuni-inĩ ĩyo.
input.src: Television reports show white smoke coming from the plant.

reference: Wathani wa matũũra nĨ ũraruta mũkana kũrĨ andũ arĨa maikaraga hakuhĨ na mũtambo maikare nyũmba, mahorie macini cĨa rĨera na matikanyue maaĨ ma miberethi.

input.mt: Athuri a gĩcigo kĩu nĩ maraheaga andũ arĩa matũũraga hakuhĩ na mũbira ũcio mũkaana wa gũikara thĩinĩ wa nyũmba, kũharũrũkia macini cia kũhonia rĩera, na kwaga kũnyua maaĩ ma gĩtugĩ.
input.src: Local authorities are warning residents in the vicinity of the plant to stay indoors, turn off air-conditioners and not to drink tap water.

reference: Kũringana na rũhonge rwa nuclear rwa Japani, caesium na iodine iria nĨ radioactive nicionekanĨte mũtambo-inĨ.

input.mt: Kũringana na kĩhũngĩro kĩa njamba cia nyuklia bũrũri-inĩ wa Japan, cesium na iodine nĩ cionanĩtio kĩhũngĩro-inĩ kĩu.
input.src: According to Japan's nuclear agency, radioactive caesium and iodine has been identified at the plant.

reference: ArũgamĨrĨri marecirĨria atĨ gĨkĨ nĨkĨonereria atĨ matangi marĨa mena maguta ma uranium no makorwo matũrĨkĨte na nĨ maraita maguta.

input.mt: Athuthuria moigaga atĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩ wonanagia atĩ indo iria ciarĩ na maguta ma uranium handũ-inĩ hau nĩ ingĩthũkũkũkĩra na nĩ ciathũkagĩra.
input.src: Authorities speculate that this indicates that containers holding uranium fuel at the site may have ruptured and are leaking.

reference: DagĨtarĨ Tony Moll nĨagundũrire mũrimũ wa Tuberculosis wa (XDR-TB) ũrĨa ũtaiguaga ndawa thĨiniĨ wa gĨcigĨrĨra gĨa kwaZulu kũrĨa Afrika ya Mũhuro.

input.mt: Dr. Tony Moll nĩ onire mũrimũ wa thigara (XDR-TB) mwena wa KwaZulu-Natal bũrũri-inĩ wa Afrika ya Mũhuro.
input.src: Dr. Tony Moll discovered the Extremely Drug Resistant Tuberculosis (XDR-TB) in the South African region KwaZulu-Natal.

reference: DagĨtarĨ Moll arecirĨria atĨ arwaru amwe no makorwo magwatĨtwo ni mũrimũ marĨ thibitarĨ, na arwaru matanyihĨire eerĨ nĨ aruti wĨra a thibitarĨ.

input.mt: Dr. Moll oigaga atĩ andũ amwe nĩ mangĩagĩire na mũrimũ ũcio thibitarĩ-inĩ, na angĩkorũo nĩ eerĩ maarĩ aruti a wĩra wa ũrigitani thibitarĩ-inĩ ĩyo.
input.src: Some patients might have contracted the bug in the hospital, Dr. Moll thinks, and at least two were hospital health workers.

reference: ThĨiniĨ wa mwaka ũmwe, mũndũ mũrwaru no agwatie andũ 10 nginya 15 arĨa mamũkuhĨrĨirie.

input.mt: Thutha wa mwaka ũmwe, mũndũ ũrĩ na mũrimũ ũcio no akorũo na andũ 10 nginya 15 arĩa ahũthagĩra.
input.src: In one year's time, an infected person may infect 10 to 15 close contacts.

reference: Ona kũrĨ o uguo, mũigana wa andũ arĨa mena XDR-TB kũrĨ gĨkundi-inĨ kia andũ arĨa mena mũrimũ wa tuberculosis ũroneka ũrĨo thĨ; kũrĨ andũ 330000 arĨa makoragwo na mũrimũ ihinda-inĨ o rĨothe, no andũ 6000 menaguo thĨiniĨ wa Afrika ya Mũhuro.

input.mt: O na kũrĩ ũguo, gĩcunjĩ kĩa andũ arĩa marĩ na ũrimũ wa ng'aragu (XDR-TB) gĩcunjĩ-inĩ gĩothe kĩa andũ arĩa marĩ na mũrimũ wa ng'aragu no gĩkorũo kĩrĩ kĩnini; andũ 6,000 harĩ andũ 330,000 arĩa makoragwo na mũrimũ ũcio ihinda-inĩ o rĩothe bũrũri-inĩ wa Afrika ya Mũhuro.
input.src: However, the percentage of XDR-TB in the entire group of people with tuberculosis still seems to be low; 6,000 of the total 330,000 people infected at any particular moment in South Africa.

reference: Satellite icio cierĩ, ĩrĩa ciakĩrĩtie ũritũ wa 1,000 pounds, na gũikũrũka na thibidi ya gĩkĩro kĩa 17,500 miles per hour, ciagũthanire 491 miles igũrũ wa thĩ.

input.mt: Ciĩga icio cierĩ ciarĩ na ũritũ wa makĩria ma kilo 1,000, na ciathiiaga na ihenya rĩa kilomita ta 17,500 harĩ ithaa, na ciakinyire igũrũ mũno ta kilomita 491 igũrũ rĩa thĩ.
input.src: The satellites, both of which weighed in excess of 1,000 pounds, and traveling at approximately 17,500 miles per hour, collided 491 miles above the Earth.

reference: Ataaramu a science maugaga mũribũko ũrĩa waumire hau warĩ mũnene mũno.

input.mt: Athomi a sayansi moigaga atĩ gĩcanjama kĩrĩa kĩarehirũo nĩ gĩcanjama kĩu kĩarĩ kĩnene mũno.
input.src: Scientists say the explosion caused by the collision was massive.

reference: No marageria gũthutũkania ũnene wa mũribũko ũcio na ũrĩa thĩ ĩgũcenjia.

input.mt: O na rĩu nĩ marenda kũmenya ũrĩa gĩcanjama kĩu kĩarĩ kĩnene na ũrĩa thĩ ĩgaakorũo ĩgũthumbũrũo.
input.src: They are still trying to determine just how large the crash was and how the Earth will be affected.

reference: United States Strategic Command ya ngwatanĩro ya U.S Department of Defense nĩĩrethana na icunjĩ icio.

input.mt: Ũtongoria wa U.S. Strategic Command wa wabici ya U.S. Department of Defense nĩ ũragerekania mĩguĩ.
input.src: The United States Strategic Command of the U.S. Department of Defense office is tracking the debris.

reference: Maumĩrĩra ma ũthuthuria nĩũkaandĩkithio rũrenda-inĩ rwao rwa internet.

input.mt: Macokio ma ũthuthuria ũcio nĩ magaatwarũo thĩinĩ wa website ya andũ othe.
input.src: The result of plotting analysis will be posted to a public website.

reference: Mũrigitani ũmwe ũrĩa warutaga wĩra thibitarĩ ya ciana ya Children's Hospital of Pittsburh, Pennsylvania nĩ agũthitangwo na ũragani thuutha wa nyina kũonekana e mũkuũ buti ini ya ngaari muthenya wa gatatũ

input.mt: Mũthuri ũmwe wa thibitarĩ wa thibitarĩ ya ciana ya Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, nĩ agaakorũo arĩ na mahĩtia ma kũũragana thutha wa nyina kuoneka akuĩte thĩinĩ wa kabati-inĩ ya ngari yake mũthenya wa Gatatũ, ta ũrĩa anene a Ohio moigĩte.
input.src: A doctor who worked at Children's Hospital of Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania will be charged with aggravated murder after her mother was found dead in the trunk of her car Wednesday, authorities in Ohio say.

reference: Dagĩtari Malar Balasubramanian, wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩrĩ na kenda, onekanire Blue Ash, Ohio, ciikaro ĩrĩ hakuhi mairo ikũmi na ithano rũgũrũ rwa Cincinnati akomete thĩ mwena-inĩ wa bara bara ena T-shirt na thuruarĩ ya thĩiniĩ akĩonekana arĩ ũtũmiri-inĩ mũritu wa ndaawa.

input.mt: Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, ũrĩa warĩ na mĩaka 29, onanirio itũũra-inĩ rĩa Blue Ash, Ohio, ta kilomita 15 mwena wa rũgongo wa Cincinnati, arĩ thĩ mũkĩra-inĩ wa barabara ehumbĩte kanjũ na nguo cia goro.
input.src: Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, 29, was found in Blue Ash, Ohio, a suburb approximately 15 miles north of Cincinnati lying on the ground beside the road in a T-shirt and underwear in an apparently heavily medicated state.

reference: Akĩonereria afithaa ngaari yake njirũ muthemba wa oldsmobile Intrigue ĩrĩa yarĩ futi maganao matano kuraihĩrĩria

input.mt: Aatongoririe anene a kambuni ĩyo kũgerera mũbango wake wa Oldsmobile ũrĩa warĩ mita 500 kũraihu.
input.src: She directed officers to her black Oldsmobile Intrigue which was 500 feet away.

reference: Na hau, makĩona mwĩrĩ wa Saroja Balasubramanian, wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtano na ithatũ, ũhumbĩrĩtwo na mũrĩngĩti waihũrĩte thakame.

input.mt: Kũu nĩ kwarĩ na mĩĩrĩ ya Saroja Balasubramanian, ũrĩa warĩ na mĩaka 53.
input.src: There, they found the body of Saroja Balasubramanian, 53, covered with blood-stained blankets.

reference: Thigari ikiuga mwĩrĩ ũcio nĩ wonekanaga ta waikarĩte hau ta mũthenya ũmwe.

input.mt: Mbũtũ ya borithi yoigire atĩ mwĩrĩ ũcio warĩ kuo kwa ihinda rĩa mũthenya ũmwe.
input.src: Police said that the body appeared to have been there for about a day.

reference: Kesi cia mbere cia mũrimũ ũcio season ĩno iranĩrĩirwo mweri wa mũgwanja ũgĩthira.

input.mt: Marakara ma mbere ma mũrimũ ũyũ mwaka-inĩ ũyũ moigĩtwo mũthia-inĩ wa Julaĩ.
input.src: The first cases of the disease this season were reported in late July.

reference: Mũrimũ ũcio ũkuagwo nĩ ngũrũwe, ũgacoka ũgatambio kũrĩ andũ kũhĩtũkĩra rwagi.

input.mt: Mũrimũ ũcio ũtwarithagio nĩ ngurubu, na ũgĩtherera andũ kũgerera ngurubu.
input.src: The disease is carried by pigs, which then migrates to humans through mosquitos.

reference: Kũrĩ mwaka wa ngiri ĩmwe na magana kenda ma mĩrongo ĩtano na ithathatũ, Slania agĩthamĩra Sweden, kũrĩa thutha wa mĩaka ĩtatũ ambĩrĩirie kũrutĩra wĩra Swedish Post Office na agĩtuika engraver ũrĩa mũnene.

input.mt: Mwaka-inĩ wa 1956, Słania nĩ aathamĩire Sweden, kũrĩa mĩaka ĩtatũ thutha ũcio aambĩrĩirie kũruta wĩra wabici-inĩ ya thitima ya Sweden na agĩtuĩka mũtongoria wa wĩra ũcio.
input.src: In 1956 Słania moved to Sweden, where three years later he began work for the Swedish Post Office and became their chief engraver.

reference: Agĩthodeka makĩria ma stamps ngiri ĩmwe cia Sweden na mabũrũri mangĩ mĩrongo ĩrĩ na inyanya.

input.mt: Nĩ aathondekire marangi makĩria ma 1,000 ma Sweden na mabũrũri mangĩ 28.
input.src: He produced over 1,000 stamps for Sweden and 28 other countries.

reference: Stamp yake ya ngiri ĩmwe yarĩ thaka na njega mũno na yarĩ ya " Ciĩko cia mũthamaki wa Sweden" nĩ David Klocker Ehrenstrahl mwaka wa ngiri igĩrĩ, ĩrĩa yandĩkithĩtio ibuku-inĩ rĩa Guiness Book of World Records.

input.mt: Rĩĩtwa rĩake rĩa 1,000 rĩarĩ "Maũndũ Makũrũ Makũnene Makĩrutwo nĩ Athamaki a Sweden" nĩ David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl mwaka wa 2000, na nĩ rĩandĩkĩtwo ibuku-inĩ rĩa Guinness Book of World Records.
input.src: His 1,000th stamp was the magnificent "Great Deeds by Swedish Kings" by David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl in 2000, which is listed in the Guinness Book of World Records.

reference: Thutha wa mũtino kũhanĩka, Gibson niarakuiro na arathamĩrio thibitarĩ, no agĩcoka agĩkua thutha wa kahinda kanini.

input.mt: Thutha wa gĩthurano kĩu, Gibson nĩ aathamirio thibitarĩ, no agĩkua ica ikuhĩ thutha ũcio.
input.src: After the accident occurred, Gibson was transported to a hospital but died shortly afterwards.

reference: Mũtwari wa kĩrori ũrĩa wakuire arĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtandatũ ndagurarire mũtino-inĩ ũcio.

input.mt: Mũtwarithia wa lori ũcio, ũrĩa ũrĩ na mĩaka 64, ndaakũragwo nĩ mũtaratara ũcio.
input.src: The truck driver, who is aged 64, was not injured in the crash.

reference: Ngaari yo nyene nĩ yoirwo ĩkĩeherio kũraihu kuma harĩa mũtino wahanĩkanĩire, kĩndũ mathaa ma thaa thita o mũthenya ũcio.

input.mt: Ngari ĩyo nĩ yoimire kĩharoinĩ kĩu mũthenya o ro ũcio ta thaa 1200 cia Githuania.
input.src: The vehicle itself was taken away from the scene of the accident at approximately 1200 GMT on the same day.

reference: Na othe magĩteng'era thutha harĩa mũtino ũcio wahanĩkĩire.

input.mt: Othe nĩ maacokire kuuma harĩa gĩcanjama kĩu kĩarĩ.
input.src: They all ran back from where the accident had happened.

reference: Maũndũ marĩa mangĩ ma kwarĩrĩrio agenda-inĩ ĩyo marĩ gũteithĩrĩria kũmenyerera mĩtitũ ĩrĩa  ĩtigarĩte, kũheana technologies nĩguo gũteithĩrĩria mabũrũri marĩa marakũra gũkũra gũtarĩ kwananga marĩa matũrigicĩirie.

input.mt: Maũndũ mangĩ marĩa makoragwo thĩinĩ wa mũtaratara wa bũrũri wa Bali nĩ kũhonokia mĩtĩ ĩrĩa ĩtigarĩte thĩinĩ wa thĩ, na kũhũthĩra tekinoronjĩ kũteithĩrĩria mabũrũri marĩa marathiĩ na mbere gũkũra na njĩra itarĩ na ũgwati.
input.src: Other subjects on the agenda in Bali include saving the world's remaining forests, and sharing technologies to help developing nations grow in less-polluting ways.

reference: U.N nĩ ĩratanya kũrĩkia kĩgĩna kĩa mbeca kĩrĩa gĩgũteithĩrĩria mabũrũri marĩa mang'etheiro nĩ gũcejia kwa rĩera nĩgetha mahote gwĩtiria na maũmĩrĩra macio.

input.mt: O na kũrĩ ũguo, O.N. nĩ ĩkoragwo na mwĩhoko wa kũhingia mũbango wa gũteithia mabũrũri marĩa makoretwo makĩnyamarĩka nĩ ũrugarĩ wa thĩ kũhiũrania na moimĩrĩro maguo.
input.src: The U.N. also hopes to finalize a fund to help countries affected by global warming to cope with the impacts.

reference: Mbeca icio no itũmĩrwo na nyũmba cia gwĩtiria kĩguo, ũramati mwega wa maĩ na wararamia wa mĩmera.

input.mt: Mbeca icio no itwarũo mĩciĩ-inĩ ĩrĩa ĩtarĩ na mĩiyũro ya maaĩ, gũthondeka maĩ wega, na gũthondeka mĩmera mĩingĩ.
input.src: The money could go toward flood-proof houses, better water management, and crop diversification.

reference: Fluke akĩandĩka atĩ mageria mothe makũgirĩrĩria atumia kwaria ciĩgiĩ ũgima wa mwĩrĩ wa atumia nĩ iringĩte ihiga.

input.mt: Fluke aandĩkire atĩ kĩyo kĩa andũ amwe gĩa kũgirĩrĩria andũ-a-nja kwaria ũhoro wa ũgima wa mwĩrĩ wa andũ-a-nja gĩtiarĩ na moimĩrĩro mega.
input.src: Fluke wrote that the efforts by some to drown out women from speaking out about women’s health were unsuccessful.

reference: Akinyirĩire itua rĩũ nĩũndũ wa mawoni mega ma mũingĩ na ũmĩrĩria ũrĩa atũmĩiro nĩ atumia na arũme makĩenda ndaawa cia ũciari cionekane ta cia bata.

input.mt: Akinyire kĩrĩkĩrĩro kĩu nĩ ũndũ wa mawoni maingĩ mega na gwĩkĩrũo ngoro nĩ andũ-a-nja o hamwe na arũme makĩmwĩra atĩ ndawa cia kũgirĩrĩria kũgĩa nda nĩ cia bata mũno harĩ ũrigitani.
input.src: She came to this conclusion due to the multitude of positive comments and encouragement sent to her by both female and male individuals urging that contraception medication be considered a medical necessity.

reference: Na rĩrĩa haaro ciathirire thuutha wa arĩa magurarĩtio gũtwaro thibitarĩ, angĩ ta mĩrongo ĩna harĩ oho a jera arĩa matigarĩte magĩikara nja-inĩ makĩrega gũcoka njera-inĩ ciao.

input.mt: Rĩrĩa mbaara ciathirire thutha wa arĩa maakuire gũtwarũo thibitarĩ-inĩ, andũ ta 40 a arĩa angĩ maarigĩtwo magĩikara nja na makĩrega gũcoka icera-inĩ ciao.
input.src: When the fighting ceased after the wounded were transported to the hospital, about 40 of the other remaining inmates stayed in the yard and refused to return to their cells.

reference: Gatagatĩ-inĩ ka thaa inya na thaa inyanya MDT, ooho arĩa marĩ mwena wa ja makĩambĩrĩria mwaki.

input.mt: Kũrĩ hwaĩ-inĩ wa thaa ikũmi na ikũmi nginya thaa ikũmi na ikũmi cia hwaĩ-inĩ, andũ arĩa moohetwo makĩambĩrĩria mwaki mũgũnda-inĩ.
input.src: Between 10:00-11:00 pm MDT, a fire was started by the inmates in the yard.

reference: Nao ahũrani na mwaki nĩo makinyire rĩa mũico na makĩhoria mwaki gũgĩkinyĩria thaa thita ĩtigĩtie dagĩka mĩrongo ĩrĩ na ithano cia ũtukũ.

input.mt: Ikundi cia kũhonokia mwaki nĩ ciaahotire kũniina mwaki ũcio thaa ikũmi na ithano cia hwaĩ-inĩ.
input.src: Fire rescue crews eventually doused the fire by 11:35 pm.

reference: Matigari macio maarĩ mabata harĩ ũthondeki wa sandbars na beaches, iria ciatũmĩkaga ta ciikaro cia nyamu cia githaka, ĩrĩanĩni na rĩerainĩ.

input.mt: Ũndũ ũcio warĩ wa bata harĩ gũthondeka mathangũ ma mũthanga na ithaka, iria ciatungataga ta kũndũ kwa gũikaraga nyamũ cia gĩthaka.
input.src: This sediment was necessary for creating sandbars and beaches, which served as wildlife habitats.

reference: Nĩũndũ wa gĩtũmi kĩu, thamaki mĩthemba ĩĩrĩ nĩ ituĩkĩte cia gũthira, na mĩthemba ĩngĩ ĩĩrĩ ĩkanyiha mũno, nginya humpback chub.

input.mt: Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, mĩthemba ĩĩrĩ ya thamaki nĩ ĩkoretwo ĩgĩkua, na mĩthemba ĩngĩ ĩĩrĩ ĩrĩ ũgwati-inĩ wa gũkua, gatagatĩ-inĩ ka mĩthemba ĩyo nĩ gĩkũyũ kĩrĩa kĩtagwo humpback chub.
input.src: As a result, two fish species have become extinct, and two others have become endangered, including the humpback chub.

reference: Gũtirĩ mũkana o na ũmwe wĩkĩrĩtwo nĩũndũ wa kĩhuhũkanio, na kũringana na rũhonge rwa Jakata geophysics, gũtirĩ mũkana ta ũcio ũkũheanwo tondũ gĩthingithia gĩtinakinyia hinya wa ithathatũ gaturuma ithano ta ũrĩa kwendekanaga.

input.mt: Gũtirĩ mũkaana wa tsunami ũheanĩtwo, na kũringana na rũhonge rwa gũthondeka indo cia thĩ rwa Jakarta, gũtirĩ mũkaana wa tsunami ũkaheanwo tondũ gĩthingithia kĩu gĩtiigana kũhingia mũtaratara wa magnitude 6.5.
input.src: No tsunami warning has been issued, and according to the Jakarta geophysics agency, no tsunami warning will be issued because the quake did not meet the magnitude 6.5 requirement.

reference: Ona gũkĩrĩkanaga atĩ kĩhuhũkanio kĩu gĩtiarehaga wanangi mũnene, aikari nĩ mambĩrĩirie kura kwao nĩ kũmaka na gũtiganĩria biashara na miciĩ yao.

input.mt: O na gũtuĩka gũtiarĩ na ũgwati wa tsunami, aikari makĩiyũrwo nĩ guoya na makĩambĩrĩria gũtiga biacara ciao na mĩciĩ yao.
input.src: Despite there being no tsunami threat, residents started to panic and began to leave their businesses and homes.

reference: Ona okorwo Winfrey nĩarĩraga ũkũngũiri ũcio wa mũico agĩthiĩ, nĩ erire arũmĩrĩri ake atĩ no arĩcoka.

input.mt: O na gũtuĩka Winfrey nĩ aathire na maithori, nĩ eerire arũmĩrĩri ake wega atĩ nĩ arĩcoka.
input.src: Although Winfrey was tearful in her farewell, she made it clear to her fans she will be back.

reference: "Rĩrĩ rĩtigũtuĩka itigana rĩa mũico. Gũkũ nĩ kũhinga chapter ĩmwe na kũhingũra ĩrĩa ĩngĩ."

input.mt: "Ũndũ ũyũ ndũgakorũo ũrĩ wa kweheria, nĩ kũhingia gĩcunjĩ kĩmwe na kũhingia gĩcunjĩ kĩerũ".
input.src: "This is not going to be goodbye. This is the closing of one chapter and the opening of a new one."

reference: Maumĩrĩra ma muico ma gĩthurano kĩa mutongoria wa bururi na bunge ya athondeki mawatho nĩmonanĩtie atĩ mutongoria wa bururi urĩa uikarĩire gĩtĩ kahinda-inĩ gaka nĩwe urathuurirwo rĩa kerĩ na mwanya munene.

input.mt: Itua rĩa mũthia rĩa ithurano cia mũtongoria wa bũrũri wa Namibia na cia mũingĩ nĩ ironania atĩ mũtongoria wa bũrũri ũyũ, Hifikepunye Pohamba, nĩ athurĩtwo rĩngĩ na ithurano nyingĩ.
input.src: Final results from Namibian presidential and parliamentary elections have indicated that the incumbent president, Hifikepunye Pohamba, has been reelected by a large margin.

reference: Kĩama kĩrĩa gĩtongoragia, South West Africa People's Organization (SWAPO), o nakĩo no gĩatigirwo kĩnyitĩire itĩ nyingĩ ithurano-inĩ icio cia ubunge.

input.mt: Kĩama kĩrĩa kĩratongoria bũrũri ũyũ, South West Africa People's Organisation (SWAPO), nĩ kĩahotire kũgĩa na gĩcunjĩ kĩnene mũno ithurano-inĩ cia mũingĩ.
input.src: The ruling party, South West Africa People's Organisation (SWAPO), also retained a majority in the parliamentary elections.

reference: Biraru cia muungano na cia Afghan ikĩingĩra kuo kuiga ugitĩri mĩena inĩ ĩyo, nacio ndege icio-ingĩ cia unyitanĩri igĩtumwo guteithĩrĩria.

input.mt: Mbaara cia ngwatanĩro na mbũtũ cia Afghanistan nĩ ciathamĩire gĩcigo-inĩ kĩu kũgitĩra gĩcigo kĩu na ndege ingĩ cia ngwatanĩro nĩ ciatũmĩtwo gũteithĩrĩria.
input.src: Coalition and Afghan troops moved into the area to secure the site and other coalition aircraft have been sent to assist.

reference: Mutino ucio wahanĩkire irĩma-inĩ iguru, na undu ucio nĩwatumire kugĩe mwaki munene.

input.mt: Mbura ĩyo yarĩ irĩma-inĩ mũno, na nĩ ĩgwetagwo atĩ yarĩ ya mwaki wa mbaara.
input.src: The crash occurred high up in mountainous terrain, and is believed to have been the result of hostile fire.

reference: Mageria ma gucaria harĩa mutino ucio wonekire nĩ macemanĩtie na moritu ta riera ithuku na ithunguri ciĩ ugwati.

input.mt: Kĩyo gĩa gũcaria harĩa gĩthingithia gĩakinyire nĩ gĩkoretwo gĩgĩkinyanĩra na ihuhũkanio ya ihuhũkanio na kũndũ kũũmũ.
input.src: Efforts to search for the crash site are being met by bad weather and harsh terrain.

reference: Nacio ciama cia medical charity Mangora, Medecines Sans Frontieres na kĩama kĩa ugima wa mwĩrĩ thĩ yothe, World Health Organization, nĩciugĩte atĩ uyu nĩguo urarĩ mutumuko muru muno urĩa wanadĩkithio bururi-inĩ.

input.mt: Ngwatanĩro ya ũrigitani ya Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres na Ngwatanĩro ya Ũrigitani ya Thĩ moigaga nĩ mũrimũ mũnene mũno bũrũri-inĩ ũyũ.
input.src: The medical charity Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres and the World Health Organisation say it is the worst outbreak recorded in the country.

reference: Mwaria wa Medicines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman akiuga: Angola yerekeire kũrĩ mũtumũko ũrĩa mũru mũno, na maũndũ nĩ mooru mũno Angola" nake akiuga.

input.mt: Richard Veerman, mwaria wa Medecines Sans Frontiere oigire ũũ: "Angola nĩ ĩrathiĩ na mbere kũhiũrania na mũrimũ ũyũ mũũru mũno na ũndũ ũcio nĩ ũrathiĩ na mbere kũingĩha mũno bũrũri-inĩ wa Angola", o ta ũrĩa oigire.
input.src: Spokesman for Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman said: "Angola is heading for its worst ever outbreak and the situation remains very bad in Angola," he said.

reference: Mathako majirie thaa inya cia rũcinĩ kwĩna rĩera rĩega tiga gũthuthua kwa rũcinĩ kũrĩa gwathirire naihenya, warĩ mũthenya mwega mũno wa 7's rugby.

input.mt: Macindano macio maambĩrĩirie thaa ikũmi cia rũcinĩ na rĩera rĩarĩ rĩega, na o tiga mbura ya rũcinĩ ĩrĩa yaahingire na ihenya, mũthenya ũcio warĩ mwega mũno nĩ ũndũ wa rugby ya thaa mũgwanja.
input.src: The games kicked off at 10:00am with great weather and apart from mid morning drizzle which quickly cleared up, it was a perfect day for 7's rugby.

reference: Athaki ngũthi a South Afrika maajirie mathako na mũthiĩre mwega rĩrĩa maahũrire timu ya Zambia 26- 00 ĩrĩa yarĩ namba ithano mũthakoinĩ.

input.mt: Abirika ya Mũhuro nĩyo yambĩrĩirie gĩthurano kĩu na njĩra ĩrĩa yagĩrĩire hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yarĩ na ũhootani wa 26 - 00 kũhĩtũkĩra Zambia ĩrĩa yarĩ ya gatano.
input.src: Tournament top seeds South Africa started on the right note when they had a comfortable 26 - 00 win against 5th seeded Zambia.

reference: ũgitĩri wao wa hadabu, ũmenyi wao wa kũmenyerera mũbira, na ũnyitanĩri wa athaki ao nĩguo watũmire moneke marĩ a mwanya, na nĩmoonekaga nĩo athaki ngũthi.

input.mt: Ũgitĩri wao wa kĩhooto, ũhoti wao wa kũhiũrania na mbũri na wĩra wao mwega wa gĩkundi nĩ watũmire magĩe na ũhoti wa kũrũa na njĩra njega.
input.src: Their disciplined defence, ball handling skills and excellent team work made them stand out and it was clear that this was the team to beat.

reference: Anene a itũũra inene rĩa Amsterdam na Anne Frank Museum makauga atĩ mũtĩ ũcio nĩ mũgwatie fungus na nĩ ũgwati mũnene harĩ ũgima wa mwĩrĩ makiuga atĩ warĩ ũgwati-inĩ mũnene wa kũgũa.

input.mt: Athuri a taũni ya Amsterdam na mũciĩ wa Anne Frank Museum moigĩte atĩ mũtĩ ũcio nĩ ũrĩ na mũrimũ wa mũrimũ na nĩ ũkoragwo ũrĩ ũgwati harĩ ũgima wa andũ tondũ nĩ moigĩte atĩ nĩ ũrĩ ũgwati mũnene wa kũgũa.
input.src: Officials for the city of Amsterdam and the Anne Frank Museum state that the tree is infected with a fungus and poses a public health hazard as they argue that it was in imminent danger of falling over.

reference: Yoothe mĩrango ya ngurunga, ĩrĩa yetagwo "The Seven Sisters" ĩkoragwo meter igana rĩmwe nginya magana merĩ ma mĩrongo ĩtano inyihĩte mũno (feet magana matatũ ma mirongo ĩrĩ na inyanya nginya magana manana ma mĩrongo ĩrĩ) wariĩ.

input.mt: Makinya mothe ma ngurunga icio, iria cietagwo "Atumia Mũgwanja", irĩ na ũraihu wa mita 100 nginya 250.
input.src: All of the cave entrances, which were named "The Seven Sisters", are at least 100 to 250 meters (328 to 820 feet) in diameter.

reference: Nacio mbica cia infrared cionanĩtie atĩ ũtiganũ wa ũrugarĩ harĩ mũthenya na ũtukũ nĩũronania atĩ noikorwo ciĩ ngurunga.

input.mt: Mbica cia indo iria cionekaga thĩinĩ wa rangi wa infrared cionanagia atĩ ũrugarĩ wa mũthenya na ũtukũ nĩ wonanagia atĩ no kũhoteke nĩ ngurunga.
input.src: Infrared images show that the temperature variations from night and day show that they are likely caves.

reference: No ikorwo irĩ horeru gũkĩra thĩ iria irigicĩirie na ũrugarĩ mũingĩ ũtukũ.

input.mt: "Mĩthenya ya mũthenya marĩ na ũrugarĩ mũingĩ gũkĩra kũndũ kũrĩa kũngĩ, na hwaĩ-inĩ marĩ na ũrugarĩ mũingĩ.
input.src: "They are cooler than the surrounding surface in the day and warmer at night.

reference: "Mĩtugo yacio ya ũrugarĩ ndĩarĩ mĩrũmu ta ya ngurunga nene gũkũ thĩ iria kaingĩ ciigaga ũrugarĩ ũiganaine, no nĩ ihanaine na marima mariku makoragwo thĩ" Glen Cushing wa United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team and of Northern Arizon University.

input.mt: Mũtugo wao wa ũrugarĩ ndũrĩ ũrũmu o ta ngurunga nene thĩinĩ wa thĩ iria kaingĩ ikoragwo irĩ na ũrugarĩ mũkinyanĩru, no nĩ wonanagia atĩ nĩ ngurunga nene thĩinĩ wa thĩ", ũguo nĩguo Glen Cushing wa United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team na Northern Arizona University ĩrĩa ĩrĩ Flagstaff, Arizona oigire.
input.src: Their thermal behavior is not as steady as large caves on Earth that often maintain a fairly constant temperature, but it is consistent with these being deep holes in the ground," said Glen Cushing of the United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team and of Northern Arizona University located in Flagstaff, Arizona.

reference: Kũrĩa France, ithurano kĩ ũndũire ikoretwo na ũmenyeru wa kwaga gũtũmĩra mũno mĩtambo, athurani maikaraga keheri-inĩ buuthi-inĩ, makaharũkia iratathi icabe mbere rĩkĩonania athuurwo arĩa o marenda bahaca-inĩ.

input.mt: Thĩinĩ wa bũrũri wa Faranja, ũrutani wa ithurano ũkoragwo ũrĩ wa tekinoronjĩ itiganĩte: athurĩri makoragwo thĩinĩ wa kabati, na makaiga kamũrangi karĩa karonania mũthuuri ũrĩa meendaga thĩinĩ wa mũhuko.
input.src: In France, voting has traditionally been a low-tech experience: voters isolate themselves in a booth, put a pre-printed sheet of paper indicating their candidate of choice into an envelope.

reference: Thutha wa anene gũthuthuria ũkinyanĩru na maũndũ maigie athurani, athurani nĩ marekagia bahaca ithandũkũ-inĩ rĩa kura na makahũra kĩrore ibuku-inĩ rĩa gĩthurano.

input.mt: Thutha wa atongoria kũmenyeria mũndũ ũrĩa ũthuurĩte, mũthuuri ũcio nĩ ahũthagĩra mũbango ũcio kũheana marũa ma gũthuura na agĩthondekithia marũa ma gũthuura marũa ma gũthuura marũa ma gũthuura marũa ma gũthuura marũa ma gũthuura marũa ma gũthuura marũa ma gũthuura marũa ma gũthuura marũa ma gũthuura marũa ma gũthuura marũa ma gũthuura marũa ma gũthuura marũa ma gũthuura marũa ma gũthuura marũa ma gũthuura marũa ma gũthuura marũa ma gũthuura marũa ma gũthuura marũa ma gũthuura marũa ma gũthuura marũa ma gũthuura marũa ma gũthuura marũa ma gũthuura marũa ma gũthuura.
input.src: After officials verify the voter's identity, the voter drops the envelope into the ballot box and signs the voting roll.

reference: Kuma mwaka wa ngiri ĩmwe na magana keda ma mĩrongo ĩnana na inyanya, mathandũkũ ma kura nonginya makorwo makĩonekana thĩini nĩ getha athurani na arĩa maroraga ithurano matuĩke aira atĩ gũtirĩ bahaca ciuma ho mbere ya ithurano ciambĩrĩirie na atĩ gũtirĩ bahaca ingĩ ciongerero tiga iria ciuma ndare na athurani makahetũkio.

input.mt: Kuuma mwaka wa 1988, ithandũkũ cia gũthuura nĩ ciabataraga gũkorũo irĩ na ũmenyo nĩgetha ateti na athuthuria mahote kũruta ũira atĩ gũtirĩ marũa ma gũthuura marĩ kuo hĩndĩ ya gũthuura na atĩ gũtirĩ marũa ma gũthuura mangĩongererwo tiga marĩa ma ateti arĩa maatarĩtio wega na marĩ na ũhoti wa gũthuura.
input.src: Since 1988, ballot boxes must be transparent so that voters and observers can witness that no envelopes are present at the start of the vote and that no envelopes are added except those of the duly counted and authorized voters.

reference: Arĩa marenda gũthurwo no matũme amarũgamĩrĩri mekĩre ũira makinya mothe ma mĩtaratara. Hwaĩ-inĩ, kura ciothe igatarwo nĩ erutĩri arĩa makorago na ũrũgamĩrĩri mũritũ, makĩrũmĩrĩra makinya marĩa maheanĩtwo.

input.mt: Arutwo no matũme athuri magatuĩka aira wa gĩcunjĩ gĩothe kĩa mũtaratara ũcio.
input.src: Candidates can send representatives to witness every part of the process. In the evening, votes are counted by volunteers under heavy supervision, following specific procedures.

reference: Tabarĩra ĩyo ĩkĩambĩrĩria yakuruhanagia athaki eyenderi a mĩgambo a kwĩrutĩra, a gĩcigo kĩao nginya Texas ya irathĩro.

input.mt: Kĩambĩrĩria-inĩ kĩoneki kĩu kĩarĩ na aruti a ndũmĩrĩri arĩa maakoragwo mwena wa irathĩro wa Texas.
input.src: The show originally featured amateur voice actors, local to East Texas.

reference: ũici nĩ watheremire mũno ũtukũ ũcio, tondũ aigi a mawatho matiarĩ kuo barabara-inĩ icio cia Bishkek.

input.mt: Kũgwetekwo atĩ ũkunyanĩri nĩ waingĩrire ũtukũ wothe, tondũ anene a mbũtũ cia watho matiarĩ kuo barabara-inĩ cia Bishkek.
input.src: Widespread looting reportedly continued overnight, as law enforcement officers were not present on Bishkek's streets.

reference: Bishkek nĩ yataragĩrio ta ĩrĩa yarekagĩra nginya kũndũ "gũtarĩ thirikari ya wathani mũkinyanĩru" nĩ mwĩroreri ũmwe, O rĩrĩa ikundi cia eki-naĩ ciathiũrũrũkaga tũcĩra-inĩ na magĩtahagĩra makũmbĩ ma indo cia agũrĩ.

input.mt: Mũrori ũmwe oigire atĩ itũũra rĩa Bishkek rĩarĩ na "ũgwati", rĩrĩa ikundi cia andũ ciathiiaga njĩra-inĩ na ikaguta indo iria ciathondekagwo.
input.src: Bishkek was described as sinking into a state of "anarchy" by one observer, as gangs of people roamed the streets and plundered stores of consumer goods.

reference: Aikari aingĩ a Bishkek makĩigĩrĩra arũrũngani kuma mũhuro nĩũndũ wa uuni-watho.

input.mt: Aikari aingĩ a Bishkek nĩ moigĩte atĩ andũ arĩa moimĩte mwena wa gũthini nĩ makoragwo marĩ na mahĩtia ma kũregana na watho.
input.src: Several Bishkek residents blamed protesters from the south for the lawlessness.

reference: Bũrũri wa Afrika ya Ithũĩro nĩ ĩrahotire All Blacks (New Zealand) mũthako-inĩ wa rugby union Tri Nations kũrĩa Royal Bafokeng Stadium, Rustenburg, South Africa.

input.mt: Abirika ya Mũhuro nĩ ĩhootete All Blacks (New Zealand) kĩharo-inĩ kĩa rugby union Tri Nations kĩarĩ kĩharo-inĩ kĩa Royal Bafokeng Stadium mwena wa Rustenburg, bũrũri wa Abirika ya Mũhuro.
input.src: South Africa have defeated the All Blacks (New Zealand) in a rugby union Tri Nations match at the Royal Bafokeng Stadium in Rustenburg, South Africa.

reference: Maumĩrĩra ma mũico marĩ ũcindi wa mbao ĩmwe, mĩrongo ĩrĩ na ĩmwe harĩ mĩrongo ĩrĩ, marĩa maninire mũnyũrũrũkio wa ũhotani wa mĩthako ikũmi na ĩtano ya All Blacks.

input.mt: Gĩcunjĩ gĩa mũthia nĩ gĩtoria kĩa kĩheo kĩmwe, 21 harĩ 20, na gĩgĩthira ngathĩti ya All Blacks.
input.src: The final score was a one-point victory, 21 to 20, ending the All Blacks' 15 game winning streak.

reference: No harĩ Springboks, maumĩrĩra macio maninire mũnyũrũkio wa kũhotwo mĩthako ĩtano kĩrũmanĩrĩrio.

input.mt: Nĩ ũndũ wa Springboks, ũndũ ũcio nĩ wahotithirie ngathĩti ĩyo ya mateti matano.
input.src: For the Springboks, it ended a five-match losing streak.

reference: Urarĩ mũthako wa mũico wa All Blacks, arĩa makoretwo macindĩte gĩkombe ciumia igĩri hetũku.

input.mt: Ũcio warĩ mũrango wa mũthia wa All Blacks, arĩa maatahire kĩheo kĩu ciumia igĩrĩ mĩhĩtũku.
input.src: It was the final match for the All Blacks, who had already won the trophy two weeks ago.

reference: Mũthako wa mũico harĩ mũrũmanĩrĩro ũcio makahanĩka Ellis Park Johannesburg kiumia gĩũkĩte, rĩrĩa Springboks magathaka na Australia.

input.mt: Gĩthingithia gĩa mũthia kĩa ngathĩti ĩyo gĩgakorũo Ellis Park, Johannesburg, kiumia kĩrĩa kĩroka, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Springboks magakinyanĩra na Australia.
input.src: The final match of the series will take place at Ellis Park in Johannesburg next week, when the Springboks play Australia.

reference: Gĩthingithia kĩigananĩirie kĩainainirie ithũĩro rĩa Montana mathaa ma thaa inya na dagĩka inyanya cia hwai-inĩ mũthenya wa mwambĩrĩrio.

input.mt: Gĩthingithia kĩnene nĩ gĩathingithirie mwena wa ithũĩro wa Montana thaa ikũmi na inyanya cia hwaĩ-inĩ.
input.src: A moderate earthquake shook western Montana at 10:08 p.m. on Monday.

reference: Gũtirĩ manĩrĩra meigiĩ ũthũkangia manyitĩtwo nĩ rũhonge rwa gũtuĩria maũndũ ma thĩ rwa Amerika nĩruo United States Geological Survey (USGS) na rũhonge rwayo rũa ũhoro ũigiĩ ithingithia nĩruo  National Earthquake Information Center.

input.mt: Gũtirĩ riboti ĩmwe kwa ĩmwe ya gũthũkia bũrũri ĩheetwo nĩ United States Geological Survey (USGS) na National Earthquake Information Center.
input.src: No immediate reports of damage have been received by the United States Geological Survey (USGS) and its National Earthquake Information Center.

reference: Gĩthingithia kĩarĩ gatagatĩ hakuhĩ kiromita mĩrongo ĩrĩ (mairo ikũmi na ithano) mwena wa rũgongo rwa igũrũ rĩa irathĩro rĩa Dillon, na hakuhĩ kiromita mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na ithano (mairo mĩrongo ĩna) kĩanda kĩa Butte.

input.mt: Gĩthingithia kĩu kĩarĩ ta kilomita 20 mwena wa rũgongo wa Dillon, na ta kilomita 65 mwena wa gũthini wa Butte.
input.src: The earthquake was centered about 20 km (15 miles) north-northeast of Dillon, and about 65 km (40 miles) south of Butte.

reference: Faranja nĩguo bũrũri wa mũgwanja wa ũiguano wa Europe kũgũmĩrwo nĩ mũrimũ ũcio, kũrũmĩrĩra Austria, Germany, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Greece na Italy.

input.mt: Faranja nĩ bũrũri wa mũgwanja thĩinĩ wa ngwatanĩro ya Rũraya kũnyamarĩka nĩ mũrimũ ũyũ; thutha wa Austria, Njĩrĩmani, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Greece na Italy.
input.src: France is the seventh country in the European Union to suffer this virus; following Austria, Germany, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Greece and Italy.

reference: Cases cia H5N1 iria ciekũagĩrwo Croatia na Denmark ciikarite itarĩ njĩkĩre mũkonde.

input.mt: Mathogora ma mũrimũ wa H5N1 bũrũri-inĩ wa Croatia na Denmark matirĩ marĩkĩrio.
input.src: Suspected cases of H5N1 in Croatia and Denmark remain unconfirmed.

reference: Chambers nĩ athitangĩte Ngai nĩũndũ wa gũtherema gwa ikuũ, ũthũkangia na tharĩkĩra cia eki-naĩ harĩ million cia aikari a gũkũ thĩ."

input.mt: Chambers nĩ aathitangire Ngai nĩ ũndũ wa "gũkua kwa andũ milioni nyingĩ, kũniinwo, na kũiyũrwo nĩ guoya nĩ andũ milioni nyingĩ arĩa matũũraga gũkũ thĩ".
input.src: Chambers had sued God for "widespread death, destruction and terrorization of millions upon millions of the Earth's inhabitants."

reference: Chambers, ũrĩa wĩtĩkĩtie atĩ gũkoro ho kwa ngai kana mĩtugo yake ndĩngĩmenyeka, augite atĩ thitango yake  ndĩarĩ na bata mũkinyanĩru na "o mũndũ wothe no athitange mũndũ wothe."

input.mt: Chambers, ũrĩa ũtaiguaga Ngai, oigaga atĩ ciira wake nĩ "ũtarĩ wa bata" na atĩ "mũndũ o wothe no arute mũndũ o wothe igoti".
input.src: Chambers, an agnostic, argues that his lawsuit is "frivolous" and "anybody can sue anybody."

reference: Rũgano rũrehetwo French Opera, nĩ Camille Saint-Saens, nĩ rwa mũcori "ũrĩa mũtũrĩre wake ũtongoragio nĩ wendo wa ndaawa na Japan."

input.mt: Rũgano rũrĩa rũheanĩtwo nĩ Camille Saint-Saens nderĩki-inĩ ya gĩthũngũ ya French nĩ rwa mũũmbi "ũrĩa mũtũũrĩre wake ũtongoragio nĩ wendo wake harĩ ndawa cia kũrebia na bũrũri wa Japan".
input.src: The story presented in the French opera, by Camille Saint-Saens, is of an artist "whose life is dictated by a love for drugs and Japan."

reference: Na nĩũndũ wa maumĩrĩra macio, athaki magucagia cienyũ cia bangi hau mbere, na kũrĩa mĩthako ĩyo yonanagĩrio onayo nĩ yetĩkagĩria eroreri meke o taguo.

input.mt: Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, aruti a ndũmĩrĩri makĩnyua ndawa cia kũrebia igongona-inĩ, na nyũmba ĩyo ya kwĩrorera nĩ ĩraheaga andũ ngoro magĩe na mwerekera ta ũcio.
input.src: As a result, the performers smoke cannabis joints on stage, and the theatre itself is encouraging the audience to join in.

reference: Perry akiuga atĩ we "Nĩ egũcoka Texas kũrora maumĩrĩra ma mũcemanio wa atangoria ũtukũ ũcio, kũrora kana kwĩna gacĩra gakwa ga kũhotithia gũthiĩ na mbere gĩcindano-inĩ kĩu", no thutha ũcio akiuga nĩ egũthiĩ na mbere na gĩcindano kĩu na nĩ egũcindana ithurano-inĩ cia kĩambĩrĩria mweri mĩrongo ĩrĩ na ũmwe South Carolina.

input.mt: Perry oigire atĩ nĩ "agacoka Texas nĩguo akonanie moimĩrĩro ma gĩthurano kĩa ũtukũ ũyũ, nĩguo one kana ndĩ na njĩra ya gũthiĩ na mbere rũgendo-inĩ rũrũ", no thutha ũcio akiuga atĩ nĩ egũthiĩ na mbere rũgendo-inĩ rũu na arũe gĩthurano-inĩ kĩa mbere kĩa South Carolina kĩa January 21.
input.src: Perry stated that he would "return to Texas to assess the results of tonight's caucus, determine whether there is a path forward for myself in this race", but later said that he would remain in the race and compete in the January 21 South Carolina primary.

reference: Bachmann, ũrĩa wacindire Ames Straw Poll mweri wa kanana, agĩtua itua kũrĩkia kambĩini yake.

input.mt: Bachmann, ũrĩa wahootire gĩthurano kĩa Ames Straw Poll mweri-inĩ wa August, nĩ aatuire itua rĩa kũniina gĩthurano gĩake.
input.src: Bachmann, who won the Ames Straw Poll in August, decided to end her campaign.

reference: Mũhũri ũcio wa mbica nĩatwarirwo Ronald Reagan UCLA thibitarĩ, kũrĩa acokire agĩkua.

input.mt: Mũguũri wa mbica ũcio nĩ aathikiririo Ronald Reagan Medical Center ya UCLA, kũrĩa aakuire thutha ũcio.
input.src: The photographer was transported to Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center, where he subsequently died.

reference: Erĩkanaga arĩ wa kĩndũ mĩaka mĩrongo ĩrĩ, harĩ mĩario ĩrĩa yarekereirio, Bieber akiuga "rĩrĩa ĩtararĩ kuo kana ngakuruhanio na mũtino mũru, meciria makwa na mahoya makwa marĩ na andũ a nyũmba na arĩa monete mũtino."

input.mt: Aarĩ na mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na kĩndũ. Bieber oigire ũũ thĩinĩ wa kiugo gĩake: "O na gũtuĩka ndiarĩ ho kana nganyitanĩra ĩmwe kwa ĩmwe na gĩthurano kĩu kĩũru, meciria makwa na mahoya makwa marĩ hamwe na famĩlĩ ya mũndũ ũcio wakũragwo".
input.src: He was reportedly aged in his 20s. In a statement, Bieber said "[w]hile I was not present nor directly involved with this tragic accident, my thoughts and prayers are with the family of the victim."

reference: Kũringana na thigari, mũtwarithia wa ngaari ĩrĩa yaringire mũhũri wa mbica ahota kwaga kũngethanĩra na ciira wa wĩki-naĩ.

input.mt: Kũringana na maobithaa a borithi, mũndũ ũrĩa ũratwarithia ngari ĩrĩa ĩkoretwo ĩkĩhũũra mbica ĩyo ndangĩahotire gũtuĩrũo atĩ nĩ arĩ na mahĩtia.
input.src: According to police, the driver of the vehicle that hit the photographer is unlikely to face criminal charges.

reference: Mitcell Gourley wa Australia akĩrĩkia arĩ namba ikũmi na ĩmwe harĩ maumĩrĩra ma arũme ma Super-G. Mucindani wake kuma Czech Oldrich Jelinek akĩrĩkia arĩ wa ikũmi na gatandatũ harĩ maumĩrĩra ma arũme ma Super-G.

input.mt: Mitchell Gourley wa Australia aathire wa ikũmi na ũmwe kĩharo-inĩ kĩa arũme kĩa Super-G. Mũrũgitanĩri wa Czech, Oldrich Jelinek, aathire wa ikũmi na ĩtandatũ kĩharo-inĩ kĩa arũme kĩa Super-G.
input.src: Australia's Mitchell Gourley finished eleventh in the men's standing Super-G. Czech competitor Oldrich Jelinek finished sixteenth in the men's sitting Super-G.

reference: Arly Velasquez wa Mexico akĩrĩkia arĩ wa ikũmi na gatano maumĩrĩra-inĩ ma arũme maikarĩte thĩĩ Super G. Adam Hall wa New Zealand akĩrĩkia arĩ wa keeda maumĩrĩra-inĩ ma arũme marũgamĩte Super-G.

input.mt: Arly Velasquez wa Mexico aathire wa ikũmi na ĩtano kĩharo-inĩ kĩa arũme kĩa Super-G. Adam Hall wa New Zealand aathire wa kenda kĩharo-inĩ kĩa arũme kĩa Super-G.
input.src: Arly Velasquez of Mexico finished fifteenth in the men's sitting Super-G. New Zealand's Adam Hall finished ninth in the men's standing Super-G.

reference: Kuringana na thitango iyo, taka taka kuuma kambĩ ya UN diarĩ therie wega, igatũma dwari ciingĩre rũĩini rwa Artibonite, rumwe wa njũĩ iria nene mũno Haiti.

input.mt: Kũringana na ciira ũcio, mathaa ma UN matiathondekirũo wega, na ũndũ ũcio ũgĩtũma thigara ikinyĩre rũũĩ-inĩ rwa Artibonite, rũrĩa rũnene mũno bũrũri-inĩ wa Haiti.
input.src: According to the lawsuit, waste from the UN camp was not properly sanitized, causing bacteria to enter the tributary of the Artibonite River, one of Haiti's largest.

reference: Institute ya Haiti ya Justice na Democracy nĩĩgwetete ũthuthuria wa mwanya ũrĩa ũronania aigi thayũ a UN a Nepal mahota gũkorwo nĩo marehire mũtuthũko ũcio Haiti matekũmenya.

input.mt: Kĩhũngĩro kĩa Haiti Institute for Justice and Democracy nĩ gĩkoretwo gĩgĩtaarĩria ũhoro wa ũthuthuria wĩyathi ũrĩa wonanagia atĩ mbũtũ ya UN ya kũgitĩra thayũ ya Nepal nĩ yoete mũrimũ ũcio bũrũri-inĩ wa Haiti itekũmenya.
input.src: The Haitian Institute for Justice and Democracy has referenced independent studies that suggest the Nepalese UN peacekeeping battalion unknowingly brought the disease to Haiti.

reference: Danielle Lantagne, ũrĩa nĩ mũtaaramu wa UN wa mũrimũ ũcio, augire atĩ aigi thayũ acio mahota gũkorwo nĩo matũmĩte mũtuthũko ũcio wanjie.

input.mt: Danielle Lantagne, mũmenyereri wa UN wĩgiĩ mũrimũ ũcio, oigire atĩ no kũhoteke mũrimũ ũcio watongoririo nĩ thigari cia kũgitĩra thayũ.
input.src: Danielle Lantagne, a UN expert on the disease, stated the outbreak was likely caused by the peacekeepers.

reference: Mũrwaru ũcio athiĩte Nigeria, kũrĩa mandĩkithia mwamwe ma mũrimu wa Ebola monekanĩte.

input.mt: Mũrũaru ũcio aarĩ bũrũri wa Nigeria, kũrĩa kũrĩ na andũ amwe makoretwo na mũrimũ wa Ebola.
input.src: The patient had been to Nigeria, where some cases of the Ebola virus have occurred.

reference: Thibitarĩ nĩ ĩrũmĩrĩire mũtaratara wa kũgitĩra ũtheremi, nginyagia kũgayũkania arũaru kũrĩ andũ acio angĩ kũgitĩra ũhoteteku wa kũgwatia acio angĩ.

input.mt: Thibitari ĩyo nĩ ĩrũmagĩrĩra mũtaratara wa kũgirĩrĩria mũrimũ, o hamwe na kũherithia mũrũaru kuuma kũrĩ arĩa angĩ nĩgetha andũ arĩa angĩ matikagĩe na mũrimũ ũcio.
input.src: The hospital has followed protocol for infection control, including separating the patient from others to prevent possible infection of others.

reference: Ona thutha wa gũtiga tabarĩra ĩyo mwaka wa ngiri ĩmwe na magana kenda ma mĩrongo kenda na ithatũ, nĩ aigire rĩtwa rĩa ũnene eta mũtongoria mũnene, na agĩthiĩ na mbere na kũoya dora million ikũmi o kĩmera ciĩta marĩhi nĩũndũ wa ũrũti wa tabarĩra icio.

input.mt: O na gũtuĩka nĩ aatigaga gĩcunjĩ kĩu mwaka-inĩ wa 1993, nĩ aathiire na mbere na wĩra wake arĩ mũrutani wa wĩra, na nĩ aathire na mbere kũheo mbeca cia ngiri nyingĩ o mwaka.
input.src: Despite leaving the show in 1993 he kept the title of executive producer, and continued to receive tens of millions of dollars every season in royalties.

reference: Hau kabere, Mohoro ma nyũmba ya mohoro kuma China, Xinhua, makĩanĩrĩra atĩ ndege ĩyo nĩyanyitĩtwo mĩgwate.

input.mt: Mbere ĩyo, rũhonge rwa ũhoro rwa China rwa Xinhua nĩ rwarugire atĩ ndege nĩ yarutĩtwo.
input.src: Earlier the Chinese news agency Xinhua reported a plane to be hijacked.

reference: Thutha ũcio, riboti ĩkiuga atĩ ndege nĩ yahetwo mĩkana ya tharĩkĩra cia bomu na ĩkĩgarũrwo ĩkagũe Kandahar, Afghanistan.

input.mt: Thutha ũcio, riboti nĩ cionanirie atĩ ndege ĩyo nĩ yaagĩire na ũgwati wa mbomu na ĩgĩcoka bũrũri-inĩ wa Afghanistan, ĩgĩkinya Kandahar.
input.src: Later reports then stated the plane received a bomb threat and was diverted back to Afghanistan, landing in Kandahar.

reference: Riboti icio irauga atĩ ndege ĩyo yagarũrirwo ĩgĩcokio Afghanistan thutha wa kũimwo kĩwanja gĩa kũgwa hĩ-na-hĩ kũrĩa Urumqi.

input.mt: Maira ma tene moigĩte atĩ ndege ĩyo nĩ ĩatwarirũo Afghanistan thutha wa kũregwo gũikũrũka na ihenya taũni-inĩ ya Ürümqi.
input.src: The early reports say the plane was diverted back to Afghanistan after being denied an emergency landing in Ürümqi.

reference: Mĩtino ya rĩera-inĩ nĩ ĩhanĩkaga mũno Iran, ũrĩa ũkoragwo na ndege nyingĩ ngũrũ, iria itamenyagĩrĩrwo wega mĩena yerĩ ya ũkui wa andũ na maũndũ ma mbũtũ cia haro.
