input.mt: Mathĩna ma ndege nĩ ma ndũire bũrũri-inĩ wa Iran, ũrĩa ũrĩ na mbũtũ cia ita iria ikũraga na iria itarĩ na ũmenyeru wa kũhingia maũndũ ma mbaara na ma mbaara.
input.src: Air accidents are common in Iran, which has an aging fleet that is poorly maintained both for civil and military operations.

reference: Kĩambĩrĩria gĩa kiumia gĩkĩ, ndege mũthemba wa hericopta ĩkĩgũa na ĩkĩũraga andũ atatũ na angĩ atatũ makĩgĩa nguraro.

input.mt: Kĩambĩrĩria-inĩ kĩa kiumia gĩkĩ, mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ nĩ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ ya mbũtũ.
input.src: Earlier this week, a police helicopter crash killed three people and wounded three more.

reference: Mweri mũhetũku, bũrũri wa Iran ũgĩcemania na mũtino ũrĩa mũru mũno wanonekana mĩaka yothe rĩrĩa ndege ya airliner yathiaga Armenia yagũire, ĩkĩũraga andũ othe igana rĩa mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na anana makuĩtwo.

input.mt: Mweri ũcio ũrathirire, Irani nĩ yooneire gĩcanjama kĩnene mũno kĩa mbaara kĩrĩa kĩarĩ kuo thutha wa mĩaka mĩingĩ. Ndege ĩmwe ya rũgendo ya gũthiĩ Armenia nĩ yaanangire, na ĩgĩkua andũ 168 arĩa maarĩ thĩinĩ wayo.
input.src: Last month Iran saw its worst air disaster in years when an airliner heading to Armenia crashed, killing the 168 on board.

reference: O mweri ũcio ndege ĩngĩ ya airliner ĩkĩũra gacĩra kayo kũu Mashhad na kũgũtha rũthingo, ĩkĩũraga andũ ikumi na mũgwanja.

input.mt: Mweri o ũcio-rĩ, ndege ĩngĩ ya rũgendo nĩ yooragire rũgendo rwa ndege mwena wa Mashhad na ĩkĩgũa rũthingo, ĩkĩũraga andũ ikũmi na mũgwanja.
input.src: The same month saw another airliner overrun a runway at Mashhad and strike a wall, killing seventeen.

reference: Aerosmith nĩ makanjĩte monanio ma nyiĩmbo marĩa matigarĩte iceera-inĩ rĩao.

input.mt: Aerosmith nĩ ĩraagarũrire ikinya rĩao rĩrĩa rĩatigarĩte rĩa gũthiĩ rũgendo-inĩ rwao rwa kũhunjia.
input.src: Aerosmith have cancelled their remaining concerts on their tour.

reference: Gĩkundi kĩu kĩa uiini nyiĩmbo cia rocks kĩrarĩ gĩcere United States na Canada nginya mweri ikũmi na ithathatũ wa kenda.

input.mt: Gĩkundi kĩu kĩarĩ na rũgendo rwa gũceerera Amerika na Canada nginya Septemba 16.
input.src: The rock band was due to tour the United States and Canada until September 16.

reference: Murray acindirwo set ya mbere ĩrĩa maigananĩte thutha wa arũme acio kũnyitanĩra kũiganania hinya set inĩ ĩyo.

input.mt: Murray akĩbutha gĩcunjĩ kĩa mbere thutha wa athuri acio eerĩ gũtooria gĩcunjĩ o gĩothe kĩa gĩcunjĩ kĩu.
input.src: Murray lost the first set in a tie break after both men held each and every serve in the set.

reference: Mũini Sanju Sharma akĩambĩrĩria hwai-inĩ, akĩrũmĩrĩrwo nĩ Jai Shankar Choudhary, makĩonania chhappan bhog bhajan onake. Mũini Raju Khandelwal nĩamumagarĩtie.

input.mt: Mwangi Sanju Sharma nĩ ambĩrĩirie hwaĩ-inĩ ũcio, na thutha ũcio Jai Shankar Choudhary. nĩ aarutire rwĩmbo rwa chhappan bhog bhajan. Mwangi Raju Khandelwal nĩ aamũrũmĩrĩire.
input.src: Singer Sanju Sharma started the evening, followed by Jai Shankar Choudhary. esented the chhappan bhog bhajan as well. Singer, Raju Khandelwal was accompanying him.

reference: Lakkha Signh akĩina Chhappan Bhog bhajan o wega. Mũini Raju Khandelwal nĩarũmanĩrĩire nake.

input.mt: Lakkha Singh nĩ aaheanire chhappan bhog bhajan.
input.src: Lakkha Singh presented the chhappan bhog bhajan as well. Singer, Raju Khandelwal was accompanying him.

reference: Mũcemanio mũnene wa kwarĩrĩria maũndũ ma bata ũrĩa wahanĩkire mũthenye wa kana Tokyo Game Show, mũnene wa bũrũri wa  Nintendo, Satoru Igwata akĩrugũria controller design ya Nintendo Revolution Console njerũ.

input.mt: Hĩndĩ ya mĩcemanio ya Tokyo Game Show, Satoru Iwata, mũtongoria wa kambuni ya Nintendo nĩ onanirie mũbango wa kambuni ĩyo ya Nintendo Revolution.
input.src: At Thursday's keynote presentation of the Tokyo Game Show, Nintendo president Satoru Iwata unveiled the controller design for the company's new Nintendo Revolution console.

reference: Giancarlo Fisichella ateithirie ngaari yake mwerekera na akĩrũgamia gĩcindano gĩake o hĩndĩ wambĩrĩria.

input.mt: Giancarlo Fisichella nĩ aahotete gwathana na ngari yake na akĩrĩkia rũgendo rũu ica ikuhĩ thutha wa kĩambĩrĩria.
input.src: Giancarlo Fisichella lost control of his car and ended the race very soon after the start.

reference: Fenarndo Alonso, ũrĩa mathakagĩra nake mwena ũmwe, arĩ harĩ arĩa matongoretie gwa kahinda karaihu gĩcindano-inĩ, no agĩtiga orĩo thutha wa kũrũgama, rĩngĩ nĩ ũndũ wa kũgũrũ kwa mbere kũrĩa gũekĩrĩto ũũru.

input.mt: Mũrata wake Fernando Alonso nĩwe watongoretie rũgendo-inĩ rũu rũnene, no aarĩkia rũgendo rũu o thutha wa gũtiga, hihi nĩ ũndũ wa kĩara gĩake kĩa mbere gĩa mwena wa ũrĩo kũgĩte wega.
input.src: His teammate Fernando Alonso was in the lead for most of the race, but ended it right after his pit-stop, probably because a badly tucked right front wheel.

reference: "Nĩ mũthaka mũno na oho nĩ ainaga wega biũ"akiuga kũringana na mandĩko ma mohoro ma kĩgomano.

input.mt: Oigire ũũ kũringana na rũgano rwa mũcemanio ũcio wa mohoro: "Nĩ mũthaka mũno na nĩ araina wega mũno".
input.src: "She’s very cute and sings quite well, too," he said according to a transcript of the news conference.

reference: Nĩ ndakenaga hĩndĩ ciothe rĩrĩa ndeka meharĩrĩria ma ũndũ ũcio, kuma ngoro yakwa gĩtina.

input.mt: Nĩ ndakenagio mũno rĩrĩa rĩothe twathomithagia ũhoro ũcio kuuma ngoro-inĩ".
input.src: "I was moved every time we did a rehearsal on this, from the bottom of my heart."

reference: Kĩndũ dagĩka ithatũ kuma igongona rĩambĩrĩria, kamera yarĩ ho ĩkĩonania cienyũ cia maratathi ma kũgitĩra ikĩenyũka kuma matangi-inĩ ma maguta.

input.mt: Thutha wa ndagĩka ithatũ kuuma kambũni ĩyo ĩkĩambĩrĩria, kamera ĩmwe ya kambũni ĩyo nĩ yonanirie tũcunjĩ tũingĩ twa gĩthima gĩa gũteithĩrĩria tũgĩtigana na tangi ya maguta.
input.src: Around 3 minutes into the launch, an on-board camera showed numerous pieces of insulation foam break away from the fuel tank.

reference: Ona kũrĩ o ũguo, matirecirĩrio nĩ marathũkirie shuttle ĩyo.

input.mt: O na kũrĩ ũguo, andũ matiĩciragia atĩ nĩ maathũkirie ndege ĩyo.
input.src: However, they are not thought to have caused any damage to the shuttle.

reference: Ndagĩka ithano thutha wa monanio kwambĩrĩria, rũhuho rũkĩambĩrĩria kũingĩra, dagĩka nini thutha ũcio huho icio igĩkinyia ihenya rĩa kiromita mĩrongo mũgwanja harĩ ithaa, o rĩo mbura ĩkiura, ĩ nditũ mũno na ĩ nene nginya yaringaga ngothi ya mwĩri ta cindano, ĩkĩrũmĩrĩrwo nĩ mbura ya mbembe kuma igũrũ, andũ makĩambĩrĩria kũmaka na kũgirĩria magĩteng'eraga makĩranganaga.

input.mt: Thutha wa ndagĩka ithano, rũhuho rũgĩũka, na thutha wa ndagĩka ĩmwe rũhuho rũgĩkinya makinya 70 km/h. Hĩndĩ ĩyo mbura ĩgĩũka na hinya mũno na ĩgĩtuĩka nene mũno nginya ĩkĩhũũra mwĩrĩ waku ta iraũ, na thutha ũcio mbura ya mbembe ĩkĩgũa kuuma igũrũ, andũ makĩiyũrwo nĩ guoya, makĩanĩrĩra, na makĩhĩtũkĩra o mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ.
input.src: Five minutes into the display a wind starts rolling in, about a minute later, the wind is reaching 70km/h... then the rain comes, but so hard and so large that it slaps your skin like a needle, then hail fell from the sky, people panicking and screaming and running over each other.

reference: NHK oho nĩyaribotire atĩ kĩganda gĩa gũthondeka hinya wa nuclear kĩa Kashiwazaki Kariwa nuclear power plant kĩrĩa gĩkoragwo gĩcigĩrĩra kĩroragwo gĩa Niigata nĩ kĩarutaga wĩra o wega.

input.mt: NHK nĩ yonanirie atĩ kĩhũngĩro kĩa hinya wa nyuklia kĩa Kashiwazaki Kariwa gĩcigo-inĩ kĩa Niigata kĩarĩ na wĩra mwega.
input.src: NHK also reported that the Kashiwazaki Kariwa nuclear power plant in Niigata prefecture was operating normally.

reference: Nĩ kwerĩkanaga atĩ mĩciĩ ngiri kenda na magana mana itũũra-inĩ rĩu ndĩarĩ na maĩ na ĩngĩ ĩkuhĩrĩirie igana rĩmwe ndĩarĩ na thitima.

input.mt: Kũringana na riboti, mĩciĩ ta 9,400 thĩinĩ wa gĩcigo kĩu ndĩ na maĩ, na hakuhĩ mĩciĩ 100 ndĩ na thitima.
input.src: It is reported that some 9400 homes in the region are without water and approximately 100 without electricity.

reference: Riboti ĩmwe ĩkĩheana mohoro mahũre mũkonde atĩ ikuũ ciakinyĩte inyanya, na riboti icio hetũkie ikonania atĩ andũ makinyĩte mĩrongo ĩtatũ nĩ magĩte nguraro; no maumĩrĩra ma mũico matiũĩkaine.

input.mt: Kũringana na riboti imwe, mũigana wa andũ arĩa makuĩte nĩ 8, na riboti imwe cionanagia atĩ andũ 30 nĩ maakuire; no matiũĩ mũigana wa andũ arĩa makuĩte.
input.src: Some reports put the official death toll at eight, and official reports confirm that up to 30 were injured; but final numbers are not yet known.

reference: Compounds icio cĩerĩ ciĩringanagĩra gũthondeka mahiga marĩa mahingagĩrĩria ũruti wa wĩra wa higo, athuthuria a cukuru mũnene kuuga.

input.mt: Arutwo a yunivasĩtĩ ĩyo moigire atĩ mĩmera ĩyo ĩrĩkoragwo na mũtaratara wa gũthondeka macindano marĩa mangĩgirĩrĩria nyumu kũruta wĩra.
input.src: The two compounds react with one another to form crystals that may block kidney function, researchers at the university said.

reference: Athuthuria acio makĩona mahiga methodekete mathugumo-inĩ ma nyau na njĩra ya gũtukania melamine na cyanuric acid.

input.mt: Athuthuria acio nĩ moonire macindano ma macindano marĩa maambĩrĩirie kũgĩa thĩinĩ wa ironda cia ng'e nĩ ũndũ wa kũongererũo melamine na cyanuric acid.
input.src: The researchers observed crystals formed in cat urine by the addition of melamine and cyanuric acid.

reference: Ona kũrĩ o ũguo, gĩcunjĩ kĩa mĩrongo ĩrĩ na inyanya gĩa indo ciitu nĩ irengagwo igoti nĩ mabũrũri ma gatagatĩ ka America. Nĩ tũmũthodekaga.

input.mt: O na kũrĩ ũguo, 80% ya indo citũ nĩ ciaheanagwo igooti nĩ ũndũ wa mĩrigo ya mabũrũri ma Amerika ya Gatagatĩ.
input.src: Yet eighty percent of our goods were taxed through tariffs in Central American countries. we treat you.

reference: Niĩ ndiataũkagwo nĩ bata wa ũndũ ũcio; ndĩ na ũma ũndũ ũcio ti wa kĩhoto.

input.mt: Ũndũ ũcio ndwarĩ wa kĩhooto harĩ niĩ, na ti wa kĩhooto.
input.src: That didn't seem to make sense to me; it certainly wasn't fair.

reference: Skiers ana gĩkundi-inĩ gĩa atumia kĩrĩa gĩthakaga maikarĩte thĩ makĩremwo nĩ kũrĩkia hĩtahĩtano yao, na mĩrongo-ĩna na atano ya othe igana rĩmwe rĩa ikũmi na mũgwanja gĩcindano-inĩ kĩa Giant Slalom makĩremo nĩ kũoya namba macindano-inĩ macio.

input.mt: Athuthuria ana a gĩkundi kĩa atumia arĩa maikarĩte thĩ matingĩahotire kũhingia irathi ciao, na athuthuria 45 kuuma harĩ athuthuria 117 a gĩkundi kĩa Giant Slalom matingĩahotire kũhingia irathi icio.
input.src: Four skiers in the women's sitting group failed to finish their runs, and 45 of the 117 total skiers in the Giant Slalom failed to rank in the race.

reference: Athuthuria kuuma cukuru mũnene wa Princeton kũũrĩa United States na cukuru mũnene wa Uppsala University kũũrĩa Sweden makĩruta riboti atĩ mĩthemba mĩerũ ĩcenjetie harĩ njiarwa igĩrĩ,ona akorwo mũtaratara ũyũ wetĩkĩtio nĩ ũtũmĩrĩte kahinda karaihu gũkĩra ũguo, nĩ ũndũ wa ũciarithania gatagatĩ ka iria kaingĩ cionekaga kũndũ kũmwe ta Darwin Finch, Geospiza fortes, na immigrant cactus finch, geospiza conirostris.

input.mt: Wainegene wa thirikari, ũrĩa ũrũgamĩrĩire maũndũ ma gũtuithania mahĩtia, nĩ onanirie andĩki a mohoro atĩ gũtirĩ ũndũ ũngĩ ũgeekwo o na hanini nginya rĩrĩa mahĩtia magaacokio.
input.src: Crown Office, which is in overall charge of prosecutions, has indicated to journalists that no further comment will be made at least until indictment.

reference: Mandĩko macio, kũringana na leak, makarĩrĩria ciira wa mĩhaka, ũrĩa Palestine marenda mũthingi ũkoro ũringanithĩtio na mũhaka ũrĩa yahanaga hĩndĩ ya haro cia middle East iria cia hanĩkire mwaka wa ngiri ĩmwe magana kenda ma mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na mũgwanja.

input.mt: Kũringana na rũgano rũu, nĩ gũgakorũo kũrĩ na ngucanio ya mĩhaka, ĩrĩa Palestina ĩrenda kũringana na mĩhaka ĩrĩa yarĩ mbere ya mbaara ya 1967 ya mwena wa gatagatĩ wa irathĩro.
input.src: The document, according to the leak, will refer to the borders dispute, which Palestine wants based on the borders before the 1967 Mideast War.

reference: Maũndũ marĩa mangĩ marĩrĩirio marerĩkana nĩ nginyagia gũthondekwo gwa State ya Jerusalem, ĩrĩa ĩgakorwo ĩ mũciĩ mũtheru harĩ mabũrũri merĩ na maũndũ meigiĩ Mũkuru wa Jordan.

input.mt: Maũndũ mangĩ marĩa marĩrĩirio nĩ hamwe na ũrĩa Jerusalemu ĩgaakorũo ĩrĩ theru kũrĩ ndũrĩrĩ icio cierĩ, na ũndũ wĩgiĩ Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani.
input.src: Other topics covered reportedly include the future state of Jerusalem which is sacred to both nations and the Jordan Valley issue.

reference: Mweri mũhetũku, komĩconi ĩhutainie na obici ya mũnene wa bũrũri ĩkĩendĩkithia gũtigithio wĩra gwa kabere gũa CEP ũrĩ ũmwe wa mĩbango ya gũtigĩrĩra bũrũri nĩ wathiĩ ithurano-inĩ njerũ.

input.mt: Mweri ũcio ũrathirire, kamĩtĩ ya mũtongoria wa bũrũri nĩ yamenyithanirie atĩ mũtongoria ũmwe wa bũrũri nĩ arũgamĩrĩire wĩra wake ta ũmwe wa mĩbango ya kũrehe ithurano njerũ bũrũri-inĩ.
input.src: Last month a presidential commission recommended the prior CEP's resignation as part of a package of measures to move the country towards new elections.

reference: ũrũrũmbani ũcio ũrĩa rĩmwe watumũraga haaro wambĩrĩirio nĩ kwaga ithurano, iria ciagĩrĩiro nĩ gwĩko kuma o mwaka wa ngiri igĩrĩ na ikũmi na ũmwe.

input.mt: Rĩmwe na rĩmwe mĩario ĩyo ya ũhinya yaambĩrĩirie nĩ ũndũ wa kwaga kũgĩa na ithurano, imwe ciacio ciarĩ cia kuuma mwaka wa 2011.
input.src: The sometimes-violent protests were triggered by failure to hold elections, some due since 2011.

reference: Ofisi cia Northern Mariana cia ũgitĩri ciugĩte atĩ gũtiarĩ wanangi wonekete bũrũrinĩ.

input.mt: Wainegene wa Northern Marianas oigire atĩ bũrũri-inĩ ũcio gũtirĩ wanangwo.
input.src: The Northern Marianas emergency management office said that there were no damages reported in the nation.

reference: Andũ amwe arĩa manyitĩtwo mĩgwate nĩmahonoketio na matanyihĩire atandatũ magakua gũkinyanĩria rĩu.

input.mt: Atigani aingĩ nĩ mahonoketio na andũ ta atandatu nĩ mooragĩtwo makuĩte nginyagia ũmũthĩ.
input.src: Several hostages have been rescued and least six have been confirmed dead so far.
